name: Great America Update
subject: What is our purpose?
body:
Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6704%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=g%2fitwIMPcYkfvtcOwF8hxw&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69157%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NhFAK%2fBRGoYSJkLkkl9AwQ&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning. Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69157%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NhFAK%2fBRGoYSJkLkkl9AwQ&sysid=1) One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose. That, in turn, makes it possible to begin to understand our relationship to God.

The study of God, also known as “theology,” has had a profound impact on Western civilization, stretching back thousands of years to the ancient Hebrews. And that’s what Hillsdale’s **“Theology 101” **online course is about--the development of theology from the Old Testament through the twentieth century.

**“Theology 101”** has been a popular course, so I’m pleased to let you know that it is [**now available for you to own on DVD**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69158%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=C9sUoivaK32u2LOzyKrG0g&sysid=1). You can add it to your home library or give it as a gift to a friend or relative.

We do have a limited number of sets in stock, though--and they go fast--so don’t delay in getting your copy of **“Theology 101”** on DVD. Secure yours right now at: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-theology-101-dvd](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69159%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Gz%2fApT%2fxpixeEePZQc%2b4iQ&sysid=1)** Best regards,

subject: Hurry, last chance to claim your gear
body:
If you like firearms, then you're in the right place. Remember you can unsubscribe

[http://https://links.firearmman.com/a/1634/one_click_unsubscribe/354/56327/a91e2e7cb21b509eb92cdfc7be2a04387975631c]

here at any time.

[https://www.firearmman.com/]

February 19th, 2022

[https://www.firearmman.com/]

This is horrible news,

It’s regarding your credit card purchase records.

They’ve been exposed.

As of February 19th, 2022, over 13 government agencies have full access to your entire credit card purchase history.

Here’s why this is very bad for you,

Even if you think you have nothing to hide...

All it takes is for them to find ANY purchases they deem as “suspicious”... and they could easily:

Investigate you for “extremist activity”

Freeze your assets

Even throw you in jail!

So if you’ve purchased any guns, ammo, survival supplies, or anything like that in the past 10 years...

You need to know 3 simple steps to become invisible to this disgusting surveillance of your finances.

You can see exactly what they are in the new and FREE book “Avoiding the Eye” by Richard Marshall.

[http://c4network.go2cloud.org/aff_c?offer_id=275&aff_id=1072&aff_sub=ILMG_1634]

But your Free copy of this shocking book doesn’t just help you protect your purchase records...

Inside, you’ll also discover:

Which part of your car talks to Big Brother... and how to shut it up.

How common appliances spy on you

[http://c4network.go2cloud.org/aff_c?offer_id=275&aff_id=1072&aff_sub=ILMG_1634]

- and how to blindfold them for good.

Even though they can listen to your phone... you can do this simple thing to block them.

And more!

The CIA openly admitted before Congress all of this is happening.

And that’s why the author of “Avoiding the Eye”, Richard Marshall, wants you to have his new book for Free

[http://c4network.go2cloud.org/aff_c?offer_id=275&aff_id=1072&aff_sub=ILMG_1634]

!

Marshall is one of the top survivalists in the nation and claims to have extensive government connections – wants to keep Americans informed and protected.

So he’s decided to give a few copies of his incredible book away for Free.

And while Richard's nice... he ain’t rich. Which means supplies are limited to just 200 copies - and a ton have already been claimed.

To keep the government’s nose out of your business click here and get your Free copy before the rest are gone.

[http://c4network.go2cloud.org/aff_c?offer_id=275&aff_id=1072&aff_sub=ILMG_1634]

Thank You.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by newsletter@firearmman.com

Manage Subscriptions

https://links.firearmman.com/a/1634/unsubscribe/354/56327/a91e2e7cb21b509eb92cdfc7be2a04387975631c

US

name: Truckers for Freedom
subject: The USA Freedom Convoy is coming
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Great American Patriot Project
body:
---
| | |
Peter,

I'm writing to you with very exciting news. Just like our neighbors to the North in Canada, America's truckers are fed up with the unscientific and unconstitutional government overreach we've endured over the past two years, _and we 're taking action._

**That 's right, a Freedom Convoy driving from California to Washington, D.C. is beginning on March 2nd!**
**_[SUPPORT THE CONVOY](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59604558:Jiub0tECN:m:1:3298722022:316320BE80ED8BAE35BE9B38FC320AF7:r)_**
We've had enough. Vaccine mandates, mask mandates, lockdowns, and restrictions have all failed to stop the spread of the virus. **As we all know, it stopped being about the virus a long time ago, it's just about control and power.**

When Justin Trudeau announced he was using terrorism laws to freeze the bank accounts of peaceful protestors in Ottawa without due process, **_HE DIDN 'T MENTION COVID ONCE!!!_**

These same tyrannical, thuggish tactics will come to America if we don't stand up and say ENOUGH IS ENOUGH, [**_which is why we 're asking you to join us by making a secure donation on our independent fundraising platform._**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59604558:Jiub0tECN:m:1:3298722022:316320BE80ED8BAE35BE9B38FC320AF7:r)

Your money will go directly to paying for fuel and food for the brave Truckers in the Freedom Convoy. With gas prices skyrocketing under Joe Biden, fuel for the cross country trip is $5,000 per Big Rig! [**_$15 = 10 Miles_**

**_$30 = 20 Miles_**

**_$150 = 100 Miles_**

**_$375 = 250 Miles_**

**_$750 = 500 Miles_**

**_$1,500 = 1,000 Miles_**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59604558:Jiub0tECN:m:1:3298722022:316320BE80ED8BAE35BE9B38FC320AF7:r)

[**_So, I hope you 'll join us as we embark upon this great journey with a generous gift of any amount._**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59604558:Jiub0tECN:m:1:3298722022:316320BE80ED8BAE35BE9B38FC320AF7:r)

clean_body: | | | Peter, I'm writing to you with very exciting news. Just like our neighbors to the North in Canada, America's truckers are fed up with the unscientific and unconstitutional government overreach we've endured over the past two years, and we 're taking action. That 's right, a Freedom Convoy driving from California to Washington, D.C. is beginning on March 2nd! We've had enough. Vaccine mandates, mask mandates, lockdowns, and restrictions have all failed to stop the spread of the virus. As we all know, it stopped being about the virus a long time ago, it's just about control and power. When Justin Trudeau announced he was using terrorism laws to freeze the bank accounts of peaceful protestors in Ottawa without due process, HE DIDN 'T MENTION COVID ONCE!!! These same tyrannical, thuggish tactics will come to America if we don't stand up and say ENOUGH IS ENOUGH, Your money will go directly to paying for fuel and food for the brave Truckers in the Freedom Convoy. With gas prices skyrocketing under Joe Biden, fuel for the cross country trip is $5,000 per Big Rig! We the Truckers, and We the People, have had enough of the creeping tyranny, and we're putting our lives on hold and our livelihoods on the line to get our Freedom back. subject: Are YOU on Nancy Pelosi's list?

body:
I know I am! Here's how I earned it... [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-qbfx-yuhdluddtl-r/) _Peter,_**I'm on Nancy Pelosi's target list.**_And I couldn't be more proud of it._ It means I've got a spine. It means I've got principles. And it means that I'm willing to fight back against their radical socialist agenda that's ruining our country! How about YOU? [Are you willing to take your place on Pelosi's enemies list?](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-qbfx-yuhdluddtl-y/) [ADD YOUR NAME - Join me on Pelosi's List! >>>](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-qbfx-yuhdluddtl-j/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-qbfx-yuhdluddtl-t/) How do you earn your spot on the target list?
* If you voted NO on impeachment, you're on the list!
* If you were endorsed by President Trump, you're on the list!
* If you voted NO to the shameful January 6th committee, you're on the list!

**I've earned my place. **_And it's earned me a target on my back this November._ That's why I'm reaching out to you today - I hope you're proud to stand with me. If Pelosi is unhappy with us, we must be doing something right! name: American Update
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9588%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=bR%2f1FBGxnwt8QPZA%2bTC7zg&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c14718%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fL04MdXfmiUVIbxmKwZgPw&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c14719%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tpEAZRZk2WtbvakY40RDbw&sysid=1) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c14710%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4EV7TDZEb5Wb%2baQYoGKYuA&sysid=1)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

### [What does it take to run a Political Campaign these days?
](http://click1.srnemail.com/lqghjnffjldrllcfrddymrqlsjrwnsslknycskdkhqkghd_yvsggffqflqvnsgfklcsmmm.html)Friday, February 19
Today on The Doug Collins Podcast, I am joined by Phil Vangelakos, the managing partner of Push Digital. We take a deep dive into what really makes a campaign successful. We also blow up the myths that folks tell themselves like "I am a different candidate" " We will win on Grassroots alone" This is a show you will want to listen to and share with those who have ever thought about running for political office.

[](http://click1.srnemail.com/lqkhjnffjldrllcfrddymrqlsjrwnsslknycskdkhqkghj_yvsggffqflqvnsgfklcsmmm.html)
---
| [](http://click1.srnemail.com/ycsvkgppkwfnwwtpnffzsncwyknbgyywlgztylflvclqvg_yvsggffqflqvnsgfklcsmmm.html?a=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&b=336528)

### [Can Congress be brought into the 21st Century
](http://click1.srnemail.com/upccnfzznjgsjjkzsggdhsmjvnspfvvjqfdkvqgqcmqwcm_yvsggffqflqvnsgfklcsmmm.html)Wednesday, February 16
Today on The Doug Collins Podcast, I am pleased to be joined by Rep. William Timmons of South Carolina. Besides being a rising star in Washington, he is the Vice Chair of the Select Committee on the Modernization of Congress. We take a deep dive into things that can be done to make Congress not only more efficient in its work for members but for the American people as well. You will be surprised by the things the Committee is working on and how their recommendations will make Congress operate in a more efficient manner.

[](http://click1.srnemail.com/tmjpvcddvtbkttrdkbbglkjtsvkmcsstzcgrszbzpjzhpp_yvsggffqflqvnsgfklcsmmm.html)

](http://click1.srnemail.com/sjvpmkzzmgctgghztccdbtlgwmtskwwgrkdhwrcrplrcjr_yvsggffqflqvnsgfklcsmmm.html)Monday, February 14
[](http://click1.srnemail.com/uyqcnfzznjgsjjkzsggdhsmjvnspfvvjqfdkvqgqcmqgyw_yvsggffqflqvnsgfklcsmmm.html) Today on The Doug Collins Podcast, I am joined by Erich Pratt, with Gun Owners of America. We have an in depth discussion about the state of the 2nd Amendment and how proposed infringements upon our Gun rights effect our country. We must remember that our rights cannot just be taken away!

name: Deb McGrath
subject: We need to protect voting rights, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEB MCGRATH FOR CONGRESS
body:
This is critical.

| Peter,

Voting is not a privilege. It is a fundamental right given to us by the Constitution.

But this right is under attack across the nation - especially for Black and Brown Americans. This Black History Month, it has become more critical than ever that we fight to defend the right to vote. **[Join me as I call on Congress to pass comprehensive voting rights legislation. Our goal is 1,000 signatures by midnight. Add your name now>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41977075/331148509/1315010756?refcode=ea.5f912439-8c91-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.5f912439-8c91-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjkxMjQzOS04YzkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fJiaDtJLITvD7FvMyLXhtf5tBIwYg0B2AoR-fgVXgnY=&emci=69d3af34-0e90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=5f912439-8c91-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=5944225)** | ****[SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41977077/331148513/1315010756?refcode=ea.5f912439-8c91-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.5f912439-8c91-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjkxMjQzOS04YzkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fJiaDtJLITvD7FvMyLXhtf5tBIwYg0B2AoR-fgVXgnY=&emci=69d3af34-0e90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=5f912439-8c91-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=5944225)****
---
Just last week, the Wisconsin Supreme Court ruled that absentee ballot drop boxes will be banned in our April elections.

**19 states enacted voter suppression laws during 2020 and 2021.** These limits on voting rights come after voters of color turned out in droves in 2020 - more than any presidential election since 2012. It’s not a coincidence, Peter.

We have always been a nation built on the ideals of free and fair elections and equal opportunity. **But to protect those ideals and make them a reality, we must defend voting rights** and stop all efforts to suppress voting here in Wisconsin and across the country.

**[This Black History Month, I am calling on our leaders in Congress to finally pass comprehensive voting rights legislation and defend the right to vote for everyone. Join me and sign the petition by midnight>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41977079/331148519/1315010756?refcode=ea.5f912439-8c91-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.5f912439-8c91-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjkxMjQzOS04YzkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fJiaDtJLITvD7FvMyLXhtf5tBIwYg0B2AoR-fgVXgnY=&emci=69d3af34-0e90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=5f912439-8c91-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=5944225)**
****[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41977083/331148529/1315010756?refcode=ea.5f912439-8c91-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.5f912439-8c91-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjkxMjQzOS04YzkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fJiaDtJLITvD7FvMyLXhtf5tBIwYg0B2AoR-fgVXgnY=&emci=69d3af34-0e90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=5f912439-8c91-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=5944225)****

With gratitude,

Deb
| **Deb McGrath is an Army Veteran, former CIA officer, and mother of three running for Congress in WI-03. She’s fighting for affordable health care, good-paying jobs, and common prosperity.**

Deb served our country for over four decades from all over the world. Now she’s being called to serve her hometown and western Wisconsin in Congress. Top Democrats like Congressman Schiff know that this is our best chance in decades to flip this seat blue. subject: I knew the price I’d have to pay
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
But it didn’t matter. I had to do what was right for our country.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo2cdk8rhq199edl38okn6v9qnadoifnd9msc28o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbq6fd70elrrcotmmpg6dc5h6poeacpkcqrm9c35edj3cphmehgeat3j6hgrcthn6v970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66libbcb0e9omct70mdhmfc5lclp238h1e8he4933c5im4pr4s9h66oh5u)

---
Friend,
---
President Trump knows how much heat I took as his attorney.
---
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9sb220haa5a8koa1qaiad9m4mk0tt7u7km3n8m8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c9jm9oj2cdh2bs)
---
**I knew full well the price I’d have to pay for defending President Trump from the bloodthirsty Deep State.**
---
But it didn’t matter. I could not let the Deep State take down a duly elected president all because he chose to fight for the forgotten citizens of our country.
---
Now, the Deep State is on a vengeful mission to ruin me personally, professionally, and financially -- and I need YOUR help to fight for my freedom.
---
[**Please make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust -- the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund -- as I continue to fight for my freedom and justice.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0j34s23g408g6044c36bkir0o4mdr4bj4jo52r0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c9jm9oj2cdh2bs)
---

---

---
**[CONTRIBUTE $100](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrbe7re3m1e23lohadtnmd1nl0l2pkmkr89ur0mg_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c9jm9oj2cdh2bs)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $250](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi61eaphci9tqmes91jdvc674ro9bslfmtcbmfgg_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c9jm9oj2cdh2bs)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1m390da9jhh3rmni6t0523amfi3p96r9h28ng3g_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c9jm9oj2cdh2bs)**
---
**When the FBI launched their dawn raid on my apartment earlier this year, I knew that my freedom was in jeopardy.**
---
As President Trump said, there aren’t many other lawyers out there who would be willing to endure those kinds of threats and intimidation tactics.
---
_But I dove head first into the battle to defend him -- and I don’t regret it for a second._
---
I refused to let the Deep State and their stooges in Congress take down President Trump for crimes he did not commit.
---
Because if they could do it to a sitting president they disagreed with, then what could they one day do to you?
---
As I said, I knew the Deep State would try to ruin me for having the guts to defend President Trump and find him innocent.
---
That’s why I hope grassroots patriots like you will continue to defend me as they try to bury me in legal fees and attacks.
---
[**So please, make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust -- the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund -- as I continue to fight for my freedom and justice.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztplctvgs3s7nmtcodk9i330co641gm1a7i63el8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c9jm9oj2cdh2bs)
---
Thank you,
---

body:

---

Great news, folks! A new poll shows that Ron DeSantis “does not crack 50% against Crist.” One political expert called it a “red flag.”
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41978710/331154795/2084481504?refcode=20220219_f_1_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTA2NGE5Yi04ZDkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FcPhX7e8GnjixYyks98R1kQQSpIkdmRLJb7QoEz2LD4=)
---
Charlie is far and away the frontrunner in the primary, and it’s clear that he’s the ONLY candidate who can beat Ron DeSantis!

Democrats, Republicans, and independents alike are fed up with DeSantis's divisive policies that are failing to help Floridians:
* When COVID-19 threatened our health, **DeSantis said NO to masks** and tried to punish school officials who tried to keep our kids safe.

* When the economic downturn threatened our families’ livelihoods, **DeSantis said NO to federal assistance** that could’ve helped thousands.

* When gun violence threatened our communities, DeSantis responded by **making it even _easier_** to carry a gun in public.

* When far-right activists championed banning books that made them uncomfortable, **DeSantis jumped right in front of their parade**.

Ron DeSantis has made it clear he cares more about his career than he does about the people of Florida. So this November, Floridians are going to respond by electing a governor who cares about _us_ instead.

**_[But team, Charlie’s going to need your help to fight back against the far-right billionaires bankrolling DeSantis’ campaign. Will you pitch in anything you can _right now_ to help us keep building the movement we need to WIN in November?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41978713/331154797/2084481504?refcode=20220219_f_1_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTA2NGE5Yi04ZDkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FcPhX7e8GnjixYyks98R1kQQSpIkdmRLJb7QoEz2LD4=)_**

name: Tim Walz
subject: You proved me right
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
Team, When I first announced I was running for governor more than four years ago, my message was the same as it was the day I took office: There is nothing Minnesotans can't accomplish when we stand together and meet our challenges head-on.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41979535/331158285/-88675334?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjRiOTI3My04ZTkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H-521eWQKoVNkFZk_l06WBb9h1C7-wYnF1NqJ-OJ-fE=&emci=4612b37d-1752-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&emdi=0f4b9273-8e91-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=11244133)
---
Team,
When I first announced I was running for governor more than four years ago, my message was the same as it was the day I took office: There is nothing Minnesotans can't accomplish when we stand together and meet our challenges head-on.
Through every test we've faced over the past two years, I'm grateful to say you proved me right.
When COVID-19 first hit, Lt. Governor Flanagan and I asked Minnesotans to come together to make a goal-line stand against the virus. And you did. The work isn't over, but thanks to your commitment to keeping our communities safe, we are on the path to emerging from this crisis stronger than ever before.
Facing one of the only divided legislatures in the country, we worked together to make historic investments in education, support working families, and provide relief to small businesses so they can continue driving our economic recovery.
We took action on climate change by making Minnesota a clean car state – giving people more choices at the dealership, creating good-paying jobs, and protecting our environment for future generations.
I couldn't be more proud of the strides we've made. But in Minnesota, we know better than to let up before the job is done. That's why we’re running for a second term to keep Minnesota moving forward.
**[If you’re with us, help us prove that our campaign for One Minnesota is stronger than ever by adding your name right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41979536/331158286/-88675334?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjRiOTI3My04ZTkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H-521eWQKoVNkFZk_l06WBb9h1C7-wYnF1NqJ-OJ-fE=&emci=4612b37d-1752-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&emdi=0f4b9273-8e91-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=11244133)**
**[add your name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41979538/331158288/-88675334?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjRiOTI3My04ZTkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H-521eWQKoVNkFZk_l06WBb9h1C7-wYnF1NqJ-OJ-fE=&emci=4612b37d-1752-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&emdi=0f4b9273-8e91-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=11244133)**
Donald Trump might be gone, but his allies remain committed to picking up the mantle of his divisive politics.
The same Republicans who forced out my commissioners for political sport during the height of the pandemic, relentlessly spread dangerous misinformation about COVID-19 and vaccines, and tried to undermine our emergency response at every turn want to take us backwards.
Team, we can’t let that happen. We've come way too far to turn the ball over to a Republican Party whose leaders have proven themselves incapable of putting the health, safety, and economic security of our state ahead of their own political interests.
If we're going to stay on the path to recovery and continue making the investments we need to provide an unparalleled quality of life for every Minnesotan in every zip code, we can't give in to those who are trying to divide us.
**[Once again, it's time for us to rise and meet our challenges as One Minnesota. If you're with us, add your name to let us know that you’re ready to continue working together to build a brighter future for our state.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41979539/331158290/-88675334?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjRiOTI3My04ZTkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H-521eWQKoVNkFZk_l06WBb9h1C7-wYnF1NqJ-OJ-fE=&emci=4612b37d-1752-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&emdi=0f4b9273-8e91-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=11244133)**
**[add your name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41979543/331158291/-88675334?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjRiOTI3My04ZTkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H-521eWQKoVNkFZk_l06WBb9h1C7-wYnF1NqJ-OJ-fE=&emci=4612b37d-1752-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&emdi=0f4b9273-8e91-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=11244133)**
Thank you,
Tim Walz
****** ******
| | ********[**DONATE**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41979544/331158295/-1894352433?refcode=button&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjRiOTI3My04ZTkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H-521eWQKoVNkFZk_l06WBb9h1C7-wYnF1NqJ-OJ-fE=)********

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: You may not know the full story
body:
While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—espe
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zo5cii4rgaar0pifc4pis6inisjfqbcpp0iv4aug_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c9jm9pb5cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2d9ieuqfbdbie4rrcdljkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbo76pj763ibcdb2mkq38objcsp78pj3chomedb465pm9pdnm5ib9pbkeerr7cb0sv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66libbcb0e9omcsdkmmpmfc5lclp2bs)
This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zpvv15p00r9qtmrl7svp2c953gfstv3j6p0p45mo_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c9jm9pb5cdh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend, While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons.

King David’s momentous story provides profound insights into many of life’s most important questions, including: What are my responsibilities to God? What do I owe my fellow man? How do I lead my family? How do I turn away from sin? What is the best way to lead others?

Taught by Hillsdale College Professor of English Justin Jackson, **“The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King”** examines the Old Testament books of First and Second Samuel. This eight-lesson course explores David’s character and the consequences of his choices on his family and the people of Israel.
---
| | **This is why we’ve produced our online course, “The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King,” which is now available on DVD. And you can reserve your copy using this secure link:**

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z0t9dr8agqn6n29vh6t5c048ccmshomth5pjj5do_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c9jm9pb5cdh2bs)** By viewing the course, you’ll learn more about the nature of God, family, leadership, sin, and repentance; in short, you’ll learn more about what truly matters in life. **I hope you’ll reserve your DVD today and share its abiding lessons with your family and friends. The DVD is perfect for a Bible study or homeschool curriculum.**
---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z3a391ameihl40vbl3dh8cjfgsmkdhad2ppjgd8o_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c9jm9pb5cdh2bs)
---
| | Let’s learn what truly matters in life by studying **“The David Story.”**

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

**P.S.** If you’d like to secure a DVD box set of **“The David Story”** while they’re available, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more in support of reaching and teaching millions on behalf of liberty.

Reserve your DVD box set using the secure link below:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zo1h4kf4dt2fjkleqj2anl9na90i7fn15si5vtp8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c9jm9pb5cdh2bs)**
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Deroy Murdock, [please use this preferences page](http://e.deroymurdock.com/prefs/9z2z78q0v6rghobjo568bfcqht4of8ge32r17kg2lko).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2za6jkr39kdf7mtlpb6nnhibb9g3k4on7gebq1eng_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c9jm9pb5cdh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

Peter, for generations, New York’s elected officials ignored the needs of the voiceless and vulnerable. Corrupt politicians catered to the whims of the powerful and wealthy – even when it harmed New York’s own.

Attorney General Letitia James has spent the last four years undoing this toxic system. She has always put the needs of New Yorkers first, even if it meant standing tall against the most powerful forces in the country.

Since making history and becoming the first Black woman ever to be elected to a statewide office in New York, Attorney General Letitia James has:
* Sued Big Pharma for its astronomical increase in prescription drug prices.
* Taken the fight to those who are fueling the gun violence epidemic and blocking commonsense gun control.
* Fiercely defended the right to vote and the right to safe reproductive healthcare for all.
* Filed lawsuits against the private investors who are exacerbating the housing crisis, **_and more!_**

We think Letitia has done a fantastic job as New York’s attorney general, but those who have not been able to buy or intimidate her are eager to watch her fail. That’s why, with Attorney General James up for re-election in November, we need to know if she has your support.

We set a goal to hear from at least 5,000 top supporters before midnight tonight, but we’re still [**192 responses short**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41982983/331167666/1318698403?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk348-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGI4MjYxYi05MTkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MS51Ioyar3Fo1STThYqF9Cr9wIfpRH353ZEDMTod69k=&emci=9a628bc8-6390-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=08b8261b-9191-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=25369504). Peter, we’re still missing your response, so please let us know:

name: Geoff Diehl
subject: The race for Governor is a clear choice between Geoff Diehl and Maura Healey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Diehl for Massachusetts
body:
Can Geoff count on YOU for your support?
| | | |
---
|
---
| Did you see the big news this week?
The Fiscal Alliance Foundation came out with a new poll of likely Mass voters. When Republicans were asked whom they would vote for in the Governor's race, their choice was clear:
REPUBLICAN VOTERS SUPPORT GEOFF DIEHL
(by a margin of more than 10-to-1 over his Republican rival).
The race for Governor is clearly now a two-person race between Geoff Diehl and Maura Healey.
And, when given that match-up, the choice is clear: we need to elect Geoff Diehl to be our next Governor.

---
| [Click here to show your support for Geoff Diehl!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00102pSUibjX7E6bUzFYkW2M-i7KtgEvtbCPGNZRtWw99QWVPg8XgjV-KLBCXoFTL3OxGYzIXxzwuAzFmCb18qePUNzmhu-RRv8acRktPAde4E03ReUdsytKhBMtyikgFQDyAvLS6dcpJnF2vW582dOnpx0FnycR99ozXcCTHokZPueo9yahgVZYw==&c=2ptF3hfksj7bQyqEAC23DNNzkzJPlkO0uAjpQ5Xc13Qw2Rg8AbvmVg==&ch=IESEmwe3RnKFlfj97lsnmkMe1a9O2YCbTqUWqdsXDdcwBhVT-Oz9-g==)
---
---
The stakes are high.
Democrats have their liberal, progressive agenda on full display.
On a day when legislators should have been addressing problems at the Registry of Motor Vehicles, they voted instead to assign the RMV with a new job: giving driver's licenses to illegal immigrants.
Geoff's simple response: "I emphatically oppose our state giving driver's licenses to those who have entered and remain in America illegally. If I were Governor, I would immediately veto this bill."
Beacon Hill Democrats can't wait to have Maura Healey sign off on all of their liberal, progressive, tax-and-spend ideas. Instead, we need to elect a strong Republican leader who will SAY 'NO' to the Democrats and their radical policies. We need to elect Geoff Diehl as Governor.
But in order to win, Geoff needs your help!
Can Geoff count on you for your support?
Please show you support Geoff by making a donation today.

clean_body: Can Geoff count on YOU for your support? | | | | | | Did you see the big news this week? The Fiscal Alliance Foundation came out with a new poll of likely Mass voters. When Republicans were asked whom they would vote for in the Governor's race, their choice was clear: REPUBLICAN VOTERS SUPPORT GEOFF DIEHL (by a margin of more than 10-to-1 over his Republican rival). The race for Governor is clearly now a two-person race between Geoff Diehl and Maura Healey. And, when given that match-up, the choice is clear: we need to elect Geoff Diehl to be our next Governor. | == The stakes are high. Democrats have their liberal, progressive agenda on full display. On a day when legislators should have been addressing problems at the Registry of Motor Vehicles, they voted instead to assign the RMV with a new job: giving driver's licenses to illegal immigrants. Geoff's simple response: "I emphatically oppose our state giving driver's licenses to those who have entered and remain in America illegally. If I were Governor, I would immediately veto this bill." Beacon Hill Democrats can't wait to have Maura Healey sign off on all of their liberal, progressive, tax-and-spend ideas. Instead, we need to elect a strong Republican leader who will SAY 'NO' to the Democrats and their radical policies. We need to elect Geoff Diehl as Governor. But in order to win, Geoff needs your help! Can Geoff count on you for your support? Please show you support Geoff by making a donation today. | | | == | | The choice is clear: We need Geoff Diehl to be our next Governor! Shontel has our back in Congress. Now, we need to show we have her back! Passing the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law in her first weeks in Congress, Shontel’s delivered for Ohio:
* **$1.8 billion** to repave roads, modernize highways, and reduce commute times
* **$240 million** to update drinking and wastewater systems
* The largest investment in public transit, including our bus and rail systems, in our nation’s history
* Expanded access to high-speed internet to more than **250,000 Ohioans**

[**_We need Shontel in Congress to fight for Ohio. Help us reach our end-of-month goal and start this primary election out on the right foot by donating $5 today._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41990087/331179576/918102368?refcode=EM_FR_220127EOM_EOM_SB4C_90DO_5_NG_TESTA_l2&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDMxOWJhYy05NDkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZsA1-vfkUDeBhD7nqUQahKBpBWxiCi4AFG-YLyRRbAI=)

Shontel Brown for Congress

As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. name: Val Demings
subject: 15 minutes this morning
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
If we lose just one seat, Mitch McConnell regains Senate control
| | |
---
I have 15 minutes of free time this morning, friend. It may not sound like much – but I've been working long hours in Congress to pass President Biden's agenda, and a gap in my schedule like this is rare.
So, as I'm sitting with my husband, Jerry, and drinking my coffee, I'm reflecting on this historic campaign – and I've decided I need to tell you a little bit more about my decision to run for U.S. Senate.
Back when I was growing up in Jacksonville, I went to segregated schools, washed dishes and worked at McDonald's. But my mom saw something special in me. She'd tell me I was _destined_ for something bigger.
So, when I thought about 2022 and what our country needed to build back better after a disastrous presidency, I thought about her everlasting words to me: "Never tire, Val." I thought about the hardworking families like mine who deserve a leader who understands their lives, their struggles and their dreams. I thought about our country's need to expand our Democratic Senate majority to protect our democracy. And, in the background of all of this, I heard my mother's voice in my head telling me I could win.
So, I decided to run. And now, I'm 2 points away from Marco Rubio in a race that can decide Senate control, and the stakes are higher than ever: We have a 50-50 split in the Senate. If we lose just one seat, Mitch McConnell regains Senate control – and three Democratic seats are already rated toss-ups.

It's critical that we win in Florida – and this race is tight right now, friend. I'm proud that our movement has an average donation of just $28.45, but building a people-powered movement means it's going to take all hands on deck to compete against the GOP's millions in dark money already pouring into Florida.
My 15 minutes are almost up, and I have to run to my next call: I hate to ask this, but if you believe in this campaign and want to help me defend our Democratic Senate majority, will you donate $5 today? Here's the best link to contribute: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vd_senate-fr-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41990976/331183293/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2458-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTQ5NDg0Yy05NTkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ARJNrChbVbeGmLO7_yLmoaVbUi_SpccjByFzi2eZrMQ=)**
All the best,

Val Demings

name: American Defense News
subject: It’s ready to ship to you
body:
While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—espe
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zkdlhgp13s6siomkp0sv9c2v32h9sfq1r71b9k90_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbqe1phgmkob2pj7cgon4t9lcli78s9kedr76sdl62q7ep3iehimdchkcdj7bd3n6v970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti6lj39ppl69jr4tb662ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5im4o71cdim8oh5u)
| | | This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zi9h7h2bmnq5dl9ae3f6nl6oag0bi82p4l6o6k2g_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c9ge2or5chh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend, While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons.

King David’s momentous story provides profound insights into many of life’s most important questions, including: What are my responsibilities to God? What do I owe my fellow man? How do I lead my family? How do I turn away from sin? What is the best way to lead others?

Taught by Hillsdale College Professor of English Justin Jackson, **“The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King”** examines the Old Testament books of First and Second Samuel. This eight-lesson course explores David’s character and the consequences of his choices on his family and the people of Israel.
---
| | **This is why we’ve produced our online course, “The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King,” which is now available on DVD. And you can reserve your copy using this secure link:**

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zkb534vqjvhu8qfn04pi5k570pndor41og72psjg_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c9ge2or5chh2bs)** By viewing the course, you’ll learn more about the nature of God, family, leadership, sin, and repentance; in short, you’ll learn more about what truly matters in life. **I hope you’ll reserve your DVD today and share its abiding lessons with your family and friends. The DVD is perfect for a Bible study or homeschool curriculum.**
---
| [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zub6lln01qqvos0vcfpntf7n87cdfls7gd7bqm20_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c9ge2or5chh2bs)
---
| | Let’s learn what truly matters in life by studying **“The David Story.”**

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

**P.S.** If you’d like to secure a DVD box set of **“The David Story”** while they’re available, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more in support of reaching and teaching millions on behalf of liberty.

Reserve your DVD box set using the secure link below:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5fclu9pd6hvadkhk33a2724388hc0bofe5cnurg_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c9ge2or5chh2bs)**
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Defense News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americandefensenews.com/prefs/9z2zrrbcrt9gksm3850eiclkl3ajrq0ra9bmkk401rg).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zjpu3epm7kergmb80b5o0eb208ks2hal47qtt31g_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c9ge2or5chh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

body:
February is a short month, and that impacts our fundraising. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41992938/331193278/823540626?refcode=ea.88ece5f8-9c91-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.88ece5f8-9c91-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OGVjZTVmOC05YzkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1g7L13Q-Xs-TFR2ksdippPxG8_wgN39O43RN4iXmkng=&emci=dad3dcc5-3d90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=88ece5f8-9c91-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=1049176)
Peter, I hope you’re enjoying the long holiday weekend, so I’ll keep this quick. _I’m in a bit of a bind, and I need to solve this issue before the long weekend is over._ Since February is such a short month, we’ve had less time to meet our online fundraising target than usual. **I’m looking at the financial books now and I see that we need to raise about $1,525 before we’re back at work on Tuesday to remain on track.** **[I want to come to Roy on Tuesday morning with this deficit RESOLVED — please, make a donation of any size right now to help me out>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41992940/331193280/435245919?refcode=ea.88ece5f8-9c91-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.88ece5f8-9c91-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OGVjZTVmOC05YzkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1g7L13Q-Xs-TFR2ksdippPxG8_wgN39O43RN4iXmkng=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41992942/331193282/435245919?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=ea.88ece5f8-9c91-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.88ece5f8-9c91-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OGVjZTVmOC05YzkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1g7L13Q-Xs-TFR2ksdippPxG8_wgN39O43RN4iXmkng=)

subject: Hamilton, Jay, and Madison
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vskQJ1fHYN

You may have heard a lot of talk in the media lately about how
our Constitution, as designed by the Founding Fathers, is flawed
and outdated. It may..
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oskQJ1fHYN

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear Fellow American,

I hope you're having a good day today.

You may have heard a lot of talk in the media
lately about how our Constitution, as designed by the Founding
Fathers, is flawed and outdated.

It may make you wonder, as it does me: How
should defenders of the Constitution respond to these charges?

Well, a few early defenders of the
Constitution-Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison-have
given us the guide: The Federalist Papers.

These essays were written between October
1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, The Federalist
Papers, and were published initially as newspaper editorials
intended to explain the merits of the Constitution.

Thomas Jefferson described The Federalist
Papers as "the best commentary on the principles of government
which ever was written."

There is no better guide to understanding the
principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than through
the words of the Founders themselves. That's why I'd like to give
you the chance to enroll in Hillsdale's free online course, "The
Federalist Papers," today.

Taught by Hillsdale College's politics
faculty, this ten-lecture course explores the major themes of
this classic work of American politics, such as the problem of
majority faction, the importance of separation of powers, the
nature of the three branches of government, and the argument
concerning the Bill of Rights.

Thanks for reading my email, and I hope
you'll activate your free enrollment in "The Federalist Papers"
today.

Activate your free course now »

Warm regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning

Hillsdale College

What students are saying
"Hillsdale College's online offerings have
deepened my education and enriched my life."
- Fred D.
"Extraordinary in their simplicity and so
fulfilling in their content. Thank you for creating this avenue
to knowledge."
- John C.

Activate your free course now »

name: Maggie for New Hampshire
subject: $7.5 million
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
If you’re going to donate to one campaign today, your contribution will have the biggest impact in New Hampshire.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41993723/331196688/-947982778?amounts=5,25,50,100&refcode=jtk677-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjdhYzRhZS05ZDkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=49DHD10-5x_lMU-fItx2dpQptOQzaw6_U3AP64Kx0oo=)
Please – if you’re going to donate to one campaign today, your contribution will have the biggest impact in New Hampshire. Let us explain why.

Last cycle, Maggie Hassan won her race by only 1,017 votes, making it the closest Senate race in 2016.

And now this cycle, Mitch McConnell and his dark money allies have spent more than $7.5 million on attack ads against her.

**That’s more than they’ve spent attacking any other Democratic Senator in the country.** **If we keep getting outspent, we'll have no chance of holding this seat and our razor-thin Democratic majority. **

We'll be frank: With election experts now calling this race a toss-up and a poll showing Maggie statistically tied with her opponents, we need to make up ground – and fast – or we could lose this election and with it our Senate majority.

Let us explain why. Last cycle, Maggie Hassan won her race by only 1,017 votes, making it the closest Senate race in 2016. And now this cycle, Mitch McConnell and his dark money allies have spent more than $7.5 million on attack ads against her. That’s more than they’ve spent attacking any other Democratic Senator in the country. If we keep getting outspent, we'll have no chance of holding this seat and our razor-thin Democratic majority. body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41994476/331200739/368400405?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAzMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjc1NDdjMi1hMDkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tOvm1TlB-2HA013p9VgIUHhTa7qHCLgmBFlBoSEuzio=&emci=4b68dfaf-fe90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=2f7547c2-a091-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=14943357) Peter, You know that I don’t pull any punches when it comes to fighting for what’s right. It’s why I decided to run for Congress in 2020, and it’s why I’m still focused on the fight to move our state forward. **This year, we have a real opportunity to defeat one of the self-serving Republican Autocrats holding Missouri back: Ann Wagner.** Voters are fed up with out of touch officeholders, and they’re looking for someone who will prioritize them and their neighbor’s needs over their own political career. **That's why I'm proud to endorse my friend, Trish Gunby, in her campaign to defeat Ann Wagner. ** As I traveled the campaign trail during my race, Rep. Gunby and I met time and again in town halls and Zoom rooms. We spoke about what it would take for this state and its people to thrive: **crucial work like protecting labor unions, strengthening our education system, and safeguarding abortion rights.** From those conversations, it was clear that Trish is wholly devoted to true public service: the kind that doesn’t always garner headlines, but gets things done. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41994477/331200740/95870112?refcode=simmons&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAzMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjc1NDdjMi1hMDkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tOvm1TlB-2HA013p9VgIUHhTa7qHCLgmBFlBoSEuzio=) This is exactly how we create a better future for our state. We bring back a standard of humble, results-driven leadership that prioritizes the people. And we do it by showing up, day in and day out, for everyone.**So, meet Trish — [I invite you to learn more about her motivation to run for this seat and fight for her constituents.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41994478/331200741/-617108208?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAzMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjc1NDdjMi1hMDkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tOvm1TlB-2HA013p9VgIUHhTa7qHCLgmBFlBoSEuzio=&emci=4b68dfaf-fe90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=2f7547c2-a091-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=14943357)** I promise you will not be disappointed. Trish has what it takes to win back this district for everyone who has been left behind. clean_body: Peter, You know that I don’t pull any punches when it comes to fighting for what’s right. It’s why I decided to run for Congress in 2020, and it’s why I’m still focused on the fight to move our state forward. This year, we have a real opportunity to defeat one of the self-serving Republican Autocrats holding Missouri back: Ann Wagner. Voters are fed up with out of touch officeholders, and they’re looking for someone who will prioritize them and their neighbor’s needs over their own political career. That's why I'm proud to endorse my friend, Trish Gunby, in her campaign to defeat Ann Wagner. As I traveled the campaign trail during my race, Rep. Gunby and I met time and again in town halls and Zoom rooms. We spoke about what it would take for this state and its people to thrive: crucial work like protecting labor unions, strengthening our education system, and safeguarding abortion rights. From those conversations, it was clear that Trish is wholly devoted to true public service: the kind that doesn’t always garner headlines, but gets things done. = This is exactly how we create a better future for our state. We bring back a standard of humble, results-driven leadership that prioritizes the people. And we do it by showing up, day in and day out, for everyone.So, meet Trish — I promise you will not be disappointed. Trish has what it takes to win back this district for everyone who has been left behind. Onward, Lindsey Simmons = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = Trish Gunby for Congress PO Box 430114 Saint Louis, MO 63143 United States Paid for by Trish Gunby for Congress

**Meet Mark:** Reverend Mark Holland is a fourth generation Kansan and a third generation United Methodist Pastor. He has dedicated his life to the service of others, as a father, pastor, community leader, elected official, and non-profit leader. Mark is the co-founder and executive director of Mainstream UMC, a global advocacy organization dedicated to greater inclusion in the church. He has served the Church in Kansas for over 25 years, most recently as the Senior Pastor of Trinity Community Church in Kansas City, Kansas for 19 years.

name: Ammon Bundy for Governor
subject: We need your help!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by [Ammon Bundy for Governor](https://www
body:
| | [](https://www.votebundy.com)
---
| Peter,
As you may know, in order for me to be on the ballot in the November General election as an Independent candidate for Governor, Idaho law requires that I collect and submit at least 1,000 signatures from currently registered voters in the state, by Friday, March 11th.This is no small task, but I believe we can easily meet (and even exceed) this requirement by working together as a team. Please go to this link for instructions on how to gather signatures: <https://team.votebundy.com/signatures> Thank you for your urgent assistance, Ammon Bundy

* * *

You received this email because your email address was submitted to us through [our website](https://www.votebundy.com). If you did not authorize use of this email address, or no longer wish to receive such messages, please simply [unsubscribe](https://team.votebundy.com/unsubscribe?id=8d545fe0-6532-4b1e-8220-7189428a1194) to immediately have your address removed from our mailing list.

name: Coach Tuberville
subject: Time to END Pandemic Panic!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
Sign my petition. Show where you stand on COVID restrictions.
| | |
# **_END the left’s disastrous COVID restrictions!_**
---
[**SIGN THE PETITION**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/3700c57d89991c1d/a9dda3459358ba26c3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
Peter,

Recently, I questioned Dr. Fauci in the Senate Health Committee.

I demanded to know who he reports to – who is the “head coach” of this virus. Because I can tell you this, I have never seen so many bad calls and dropped balls in my life.

These arrogant bureaucrats NEVER want America to return to normal!

ENOUGH IS ENOUGH of pandemic panic. It’s time to stop this insanity for good.

If you agree, [**sign my petition to END the left’s disastrous COVID restrictions.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/3700c57d89991c1d/a9d6aa34cd3b9553c3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
[**ADD YOUR NAME**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/3700c57d89991c1d/30f2240fea63abdcc3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
So many of the restrictions we’ve been forced to live under have proven to be ineffective.

How many small businesses have been destroyed a result?

How many schoolchildren have been cheated out of their education?

[**Sign on today to DEMAND we get back to normal.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/3700c57d89991c1d/bd2361f18baaa772c3d6b838967d376c/33013)

\- Coach

clean_body: | = | | Peter, Jasmine has been organizing all over Western North Carolina engaging voters, listening, and building bridges. We wish we could say the same for WNC’s current Congressman. Instead, Madison Cawthorn is in Texas, hosting a so-called America First rally with Marjorie Taylor Greene and other right-wing extremists. = = Cawthorn’s opportunism is why he was so quick to abandon his current constituents to run in a district that favors Republicans in NC-13, and why he won’t hesitate to re-file in our district if he thinks it means he has a greater chance at winning. Cawthorn’s extremist politics do not represent Western North Carolina values – and Jasmine has what it takes to replace him. She’s running for Congress to be a real leader and to focus on the issues impacting voters in her district – not spending time hundreds of miles away stoking a culture war. = | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you, Team Jasmine | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. * * *
This run for Congress is personal.

**[I’m running for my mom.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41995117/331204579/1092196856?refcode=20220219_em_fr_b1_greg_30_cl_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWZmNzk1Yi1hNTkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LGNn8QpRGHP1-xH3iSveqj_iqpMgrPJ7PvhSn88GUmk=)**

She taught special education in public schools for decades.

She believed in her core that every young person had God-given talents -- and that it was up to the adults to identify and lift up those talents.

Her students were being forced into one-size-fits-all testing that wasn’t serving them at all.

So she decided to take a bold step and turned her entire classroom into a cafe where her students would learn skills that would benefit them for the rest of their lives.

Through my career in education and public service, I’ve always kept my mom’s determination to take on tough odds and make a difference for families struggling to get by.

**_[But I’ve watched Republican Congressman Chabot fight against us every step of the way. We need a voice in Washington who will fight to increase funding for public schools -- not fight to stop the funds we needed to reopen schools safely. Can I count on your $15 before my deadline in 24 hours to help me fully fund my campaign and defeat Steve Chabot? >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41995121/331204583/1092196856?refcode=20220219_em_fr_b1_greg_30_cl_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWZmNzk1Yi1hNTkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LGNn8QpRGHP1-xH3iSveqj_iqpMgrPJ7PvhSn88GUmk=)_** **[I’m running for every child and family that Chabot has left behind.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41995125/331204587/1092196856?refcode=20220219_em_fr_b1_greg_30_cl_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWZmNzk1Yi1hNTkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LGNn8QpRGHP1-xH3iSveqj_iqpMgrPJ7PvhSn88GUmk=)**

I’ve spent my career fighting for families.

I helped lead the Preschool Promise to provide two years of quality preschool for our 3 and 4 year olds.

It has helped thousands of children and families, as well as our schools and small business preschool providers succeed.

But instead of working to support our district’s hardworking families, Congressman Chabot voted **[AGAINST](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41995129/331204591/1092196856?refcode=20220219_em_fr_b1_greg_30_cl_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWZmNzk1Yi1hNTkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LGNn8QpRGHP1-xH3iSveqj_iqpMgrPJ7PvhSn88GUmk=)** making childcare and seniorcare more affordable.

**_[I believe the people of this district deserve a Representative who will make life easier for families, instead of harder. But to unseat Chabot, I need your urgent help to close the budget gap before tomorrow’s End of Week Deadline. >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41995133/331204595/1092196856?refcode=20220219_em_fr_b1_greg_30_cl_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWZmNzk1Yi1hNTkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LGNn8QpRGHP1-xH3iSveqj_iqpMgrPJ7PvhSn88GUmk=)_** **[And finally, I’m running for hardworking people like you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41995137/331204599/1092196856?refcode=20220219_em_fr_b1_greg_30_cl_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWZmNzk1Yi1hNTkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LGNn8QpRGHP1-xH3iSveqj_iqpMgrPJ7PvhSn88GUmk=)**

The anxiety and uncertainty we’re all feeling is a direct result of the choices made by folks like Congressman Chabot.

But if you want something better for you and your family...

If you want someone who will deliver for the big issues our community faces...

**[_Then I’m going to need your help._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41995141/331204603/1092196856?refcode=20220219_em_fr_b1_greg_30_cl_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWZmNzk1Yi1hNTkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LGNn8QpRGHP1-xH3iSveqj_iqpMgrPJ7PvhSn88GUmk=)**

Because I promise you that as your Congressman, I will never stop fighting for our families.

**_[I know I can defeat Congressman Steve Chabot. But he has countless big donors chomping at the bit to destroy our unprecedented chance to flip this seat blue. Which is why I just set an ambitious goal -- 1,000 gifts before my End of Week Deadline in 24 hours -- to prove our campaign has what it takes to compete. Can I count on your $15 right away? >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41995145/331204607/1092196856?refcode=20220219_em_fr_b1_greg_30_cl_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWZmNzk1Yi1hNTkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LGNn8QpRGHP1-xH3iSveqj_iqpMgrPJ7PvhSn88GUmk=)_** | | [**Chip in $15 now >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41995148/331204610/1092196856?refcode=20220219_em_fr_b1_greg_30_cl_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWZmNzk1Yi1hNTkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LGNn8QpRGHP1-xH3iSveqj_iqpMgrPJ7PvhSn88GUmk=)

She believed in her core that every young person had God-given talents -- and that it was up to the adults to identify and lift up those talents. Her students were being forced into one-size-fits-all testing that wasn’t serving them at all. So she decided to take a bold step and turned her entire classroom into a cafe where her students would learn skills that would benefit them for the rest of their lives. Through my career in education and public service, I’ve always kept my mom’s determination to take on tough odds and make a difference for families struggling to get by. = = I’ve spent my career fighting for families. I helped lead the Preschool Promise to provide two years of quality preschool for our 3 and 4 year olds. It has helped thousands of children and families, as well as our schools and small business preschool providers succeed. But instead of working to support our district’s hardworking families, Congressman Chabot voted = making childcare and seniorcare more affordable. = = The anxiety and uncertainty we’re all feeling is a direct result of the choices made by folks like Congressman Chabot. But if you want something better for you and your family... If you want someone who will deliver for the big issues our community faces... = Because I promise you that as your Congressman, I will never stop fighting for our families. = | | = = = = = Thank you, Greg Greg Landsman is a former public school teacher and community leader running for Congress to fight for American children and families. His Republican opponent voted to overturn the results of the 2020 presidential election and against desperately needed pandemic relief. After 25 years in Washington, he's left our community behind. Greg has an unprecedented opportunity to unseat Steve Chabot, one of the most powerful -- and dangerous -- Republicans in Congress, and bring real change to the people of this district. But he can’t do this alone. He’s relying on your support to flip this seat for Democrats. Will you chip in right away? = We know we send you a lot of emails but that’s because this is our unprecedented chance to unseat one of the most dangerous Republicans in Congress, but Greg simply can’t compete against his opponent’s piles of cash without your help. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe , and we'll make sure to process your request. __** Landsman for Congress PO Box 413 Cincinnati, OH 45201 United States | | Paid for by Landsman for Congress

clean_body: Team — We're excited to announce that we're launching Karen's first round of campaign merchandise, and we wanted you to be the first to know! But we need your help — our design team did a fantastic job putting together some potential options for bumper stickers. Maybe too good of a job?! We're reaching out to our top supporters with an important question: which bumper sticker should we print? With the primary only months away, it's now or never to share Karen's vision for L.A. with every single Angeleno in the city. It's no easy task, but we can reach voters where they're at if we all work together as a team. And you can help show your support for Karen with our new bumper stickers. Team Bass Karen is building a grassroots campaign by and for the people of L.A. Thanks to L.A.'s matching funds program, individual donations from residents up to $214 may be matched 6-to-1 by the city, meaning your $5 contribution could become $35. Peter, there’s good news and there’s some really bad news.

I’ll give you the really bad news first: MAGA Republicans are running laps around Democrats when it comes to fundraising.

I’m not going to lie, this is extremely concerning to me – if we can’t catch up in terms of fundraising, **we could seriously lose the House in November, and _maybe even the Senate._**

**But here’s the good news. We may be losing the fundraising battle, but we have the power of the people on our side.**

That’s because unlike MAGA Republicans, I and many of my progressive colleagues don’t depend on big checks from wealthy CEOs and special interests.

_Instead, my campaign relies on small-dollar, grassroots donations from everyday working people like you._

[**Peter, if you’re with me, I’m calling on you to chip in $3 to protect our House majority so I can keep fighting for our country, and our democracy. Can I count on you? body:
| | | |

| | |
#### Announcement

>From the Desk of Haneefah Khaaliq
# Dear Hoosiers,
While I know the decision of the Indiana Elections Division to remove my name along with the other U.S. Senate candidates from the primary ballot yesterday was disheartening for many of you, I want you to know this isn’t the end of the journey.

Together, the Senate candidates collected nearly 17,000 signatures and raised nearly a quarter of a million dollars. The evidence is overwhelming that Hoosiers wanted options in the primaries on both sides of the aisle and I guarantee you, you will still have options and a chance to support me in the general election.

Keep your heads up, stay strong, and God bless each and every one of you! Visit HaneefahKhaaliq.org and support today! #voteHK

Sincerely,
Haneefah Khaaliq, Esq.
Indiana Candidate for U.S. Senate
2022

body:
Let me share why your support is so critical

|
---

| | [**_I’m asking you personally: Can I count on you to officially become a 2022 Founding Member before midnight by chipping in $10? I only need 25 more 2022 Founding Members from PA to help me prove that we have what it takes to flip this seat for Democrats. name: Val Demings
subject: [photo attached] that's me
body:
Derek,

That's me you're looking at.

I grew up poor in the segregated South, the daughter of a maid and a janitor. If you had told me back then, as a young Black girl, that I would become the first in my family to graduate college, the first woman to lead the Orlando Police Department, a congresswoman and a candidate for the U.S. Senate, well – I just don't know if I would have believed you.

What I did believe then – and what I carry deep in my soul to this day – is the lesson of my hardworking parents to "never tire of doing good."
It was my parents' words that inspired me to get into public service. It was their words that have driven me to do good every chance I get. From my time as a young social worker to my career as a law enforcement officer to being representative of my community in Congress – "never tire" is a mantra that I've held dear.

My unlikely story of opportunity is proof of what is possible and what should be possible for every American. As Florida's next U.S. senator, I will never tire in the work to make sure the greatness of America is accessible and affordable for all Americans . I will never tire in continuing to do more good for you and your family.

But when it comes to this race, the GOP won't tire either: The Republican National Committee chair is already attacking me personally, while Mitch McConnell and GOP outside groups are ready to dump tens of MILLIONS into Florida to defeat me.

This is already shaping up to be the most expensive Senate election ever – and with just a .12% margin in Florida's last Senate race, every dollar will count tremendously. I know a thing or two about winning tough races, but I need your help because I can't do this alone.

I'm depending on your grassroots support to power this historic campaign and help me fight back against the GOP's attacks – and right now, I'm falling short of my midnight goal. Can you split a $25 donation today between my campaign and CommonGood to help make sure I have the resources to defeat Marco Rubio and protect and expand Democratic Senate control? secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_vd?refcode=20220220_CGVA_Demings

Thank you so much for sharing this journey with me. It means the world to have you by my side.

Val Demings

(This is a sponsored send hosted by CommonGood. CommonGood is dedicated to helping Democratic campaigns and organizations win critical races in Virginia and across the country.)

Common Good Virginia
PO Box 26112
Arlington, VA 22215

name: Tina Kotek
subject: Black maternal health matters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek P
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41997151/331213162/69228752?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTg0ODBiZS1hZDkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rC3z1kJiWmZPE0D_foRqP0vuEyIYO49zr572RAY48fw=&emci=b5a204d2-0390-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=8e8480be-ad91-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=15353729)
---
Hi Peter --

February is Black History Month, and this year's focus for the month is **Black health and wellness.**

Too often, our health care system fails Black Americans, _especially_ Black women and mothers. And those failures have deadly consequences. Did you know that Black women are four times more likely to die from pregnancy-related causes than White women?

We can and must do better. That's why I have supported making it easier for women with Oregon Health Plan coverage to have access to a doula, a trained professional who provides continuous physical, emotional, and informational support to a mother before, during, and shortly after childbirth to help her achieve the healthiest outcomes. A researcher once told me that the effectiveness of doulas should make it malpractice not to provide one for every pregnant woman.

Oregon - because of my work with trailblazer Shafia Monroe - is one of only two states that cover doula services for pregnant women enrolled in Medicaid. Doulas can improve overall health outcomes and reduce disparities among pregnant women, for example by lowering the rates of cesarean sections and preterm births.

As Governor, I will continue to focus on ideas that work, that save lives, and reduce disparities in our health care system - so every Oregonian can be healthy and safe.

clean_body: | Hi Peter -- February is Black History Month, and this year's focus for the month is Black health and wellness. Too often, our health care system fails Black Americans, especially Black women and mothers. And those failures have deadly consequences. Did you know that Black women are four times more likely to die from pregnancy-related causes than White women? We can and must do better. That's why I have supported making it easier for women with Oregon Health Plan coverage to have access to a doula, a trained professional who provides continuous physical, emotional, and informational support to a mother before, during, and shortly after childbirth to help her achieve the healthiest outcomes. A researcher once told me that the effectiveness of doulas should make it malpractice not to provide one for every pregnant woman. Oregon - because of my work with trailblazer Shafia Monroe - is one of only two states that cover doula services for pregnant women enrolled in Medicaid. Doulas can improve overall health outcomes and reduce disparities among pregnant women, for example by lowering the rates of cesarean sections and preterm births. As Governor, I will continue to focus on ideas that work, that save lives, and reduce disparities in our health care system - so every Oregonian can be healthy and safe. Thank you! – Tina Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek P.O. Box 42307 Portland, OR 97242 This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. You can .
