name: Rep. Mary Miller
subject: Spying on you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marry Miller for Congress
body:
Peter,

I simply can't believe what is happening to our country!

**President Trump was right- Hillary Clinton was SPYING on the Trump Campaign...and the Trump White House!**

And now it looks like Nancy Pelosi was instructing her staff to SPY on Republican members of Congress.

_Disgusting._

If they can get away with spying on the President of the United States, they can get away with spying on you!

These communist tactics make my blood boil. I will not sit by quietly and let the Democrats get away with this!

**As a member of the House Freedom Caucus, I will make sure Hillary Clinton and everyone else involved pays for the crimes they have committed.**

My RINO opponent?

Well, Rodney Davis voted to create the January 6th Commission.

**Rodney Davis also voted to certify the election of Joe Biden in two states where the votes were being contested!**

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59675364:W14ObfH0N:m:1:2365227053:200CBBAB8C6DCFC444FD9B5C9A2C0F07:r)
That's why I hope you will join me in my campaign to defeat RINO Rodney Davis in the 15th District of Illinois. **[HELP STOP RINO RODNEY
CHIP IN $10 OR $25 TODAY](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59675364:W14ObfH0N:m:1:2365227053:200CBBAB8C6DCFC444FD9B5C9A2C0F07:r)** Unlike Rodney Davis, I want to IMPEACH Joe Biden, lock up Hillary Clinton, and DRAIN THE SWAMP.

**_I already have President Trump 's full endorsement:_**

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59675364:W14ObfH0N:m:1:2365227053:200CBBAB8C6DCFC444FD9B5C9A2C0F07:r)
**[But to win this fight, I need every Patriot to chip in at least $15 to help combat the millions of deep state dollars my RINO opponent is raking in](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59675364:W14ObfH0N:m:1:2365227053:200CBBAB8C6DCFC444FD9B5C9A2C0F07:r).**

The Swamp is desperate to stop me from returning to Congress because they know I am not another "go along to get along" member of their club.

**I am there to fight for our America First agenda, to stop the invasion at our southern border, and to counter China before it 's too late!**

I will fight the Deep State forces of BOTH parties and stop our nation's march towards communism.

**I will NEVER give in and never give up.**

I am the proud mother of seven children and grandmother of eighteen grandchildren who deserve the same opportunity to live the American Dream that my generation was given.

I will defeat RINO Rodney and the DC Swamp, but I need your help!

**[Please join with me by sending in your most generous contribution of $15, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or whatever you can afford today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59675364:W14ObfH0N:m:1:2365227053:200CBBAB8C6DCFC444FD9B5C9A2C0F07:r).**

Mary Miller
Congresswoman (R-IL)

name: LBR
subject: Let’s talk about supply chains
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress**
body:
I know supply chains don’t sound that exciting...
Here’s where we are.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41998549/331218571/1627587959?refcode=EM_C_220219sc_n_lbr_actives_9_g_na_na_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMWZkMjBmMi1iMTkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ysx8qqZjC1J9vBxqlEnE179ms6dkvH1nAY7lyQq1byI=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41998550/331218572/1627587959?refcode=EM_C_220219sc_n_lbr_actives_9_g_na_na_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMWZkMjBmMi1iMTkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ysx8qqZjC1J9vBxqlEnE179ms6dkvH1nAY7lyQq1byI=) Friend,

One of the biggest issues I’ve heard about since the start of the pandemic has been supply chains.

Small business owners across Delaware have told me time and again that it’s one of their biggest challenges, and it truly affects everything – from your bagel with cream cheese to the computer in your car.

_**So I’ve done something about it.**_

The America Competes Act – and the _**bipartisan supply chain provisions**_ that I worked on – will ensure manufacturing of critical components are brought back home, create good-paying union jobs across the country, and prevent supply chain disruptions from impacting us in the future.

This bill will help expand American capacity to produce the key components for so many of the products we rely on every single day – and in the process, will make our economy more competitive, reliable, and sustainable.

This bill addresses the chip shortage by appropriating funding toward producing semiconductors in America. It aims to fix the supply chain by building more critical components in America – strengthening American manufacturing and protecting our national security. Finally, it ensures we continue to lead in scientific research by maximizing the American talent pool and diversifying our STEM workforce.

I don’t know about you, but all that makes me want to dance! [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41998551/331218573/1627587959?refcode=EM_C_220219sc_n_lbr_actives_9_g_na_na_p1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMWZkMjBmMi1iMTkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ysx8qqZjC1J9vBxqlEnE179ms6dkvH1nAY7lyQq1byI=) The America Competes Act passed the House earlier this month, and I look forward to it passing the Senate and getting to President Biden’s desk ASAP.

Thank you!

LBR

**[P.S. If you can, please consider contributing to my reelection campaign so we can keep control of the House and continue to deliver on the most pressing issues!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41998552/331218574/1627587959?refcode=EM_C_220219sc_n_lbr_actives_9_g_na_na_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMWZkMjBmMi1iMTkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ysx8qqZjC1J9vBxqlEnE179ms6dkvH1nAY7lyQq1byI=)** | **Congresswoman Lisa Blunt Rochester is a Democrat representing the First State, Delaware. She served as the National Co-Chair of the Biden-Harris campaign and Co-Chair of the DCCC ‘Red to Blue’ program. Lisa is running for reelection to continue fighting for our health care, leading the charge toward environmental justice, and advocating for working families like hers.** ****[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41998553/331218575/1627587959?refcode=EM_C_220219sc_n_lbr_actives_9_g_na_na_bio&refcode2=biobox&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMWZkMjBmMi1iMTkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ysx8qqZjC1J9vBxqlEnE179ms6dkvH1nAY7lyQq1byI=)****

** **
clean_body: I know supply chains don’t sound that exciting... Here’s where we are. = = Friend, One of the biggest issues I’ve heard about since the start of the pandemic has been supply chains. Small business owners across Delaware have told me time and again that it’s one of their biggest challenges, and it truly affects everything – from your bagel with cream cheese to the computer in your car. So I’ve done something about it. The America Competes Act – and the bipartisan supply chain provisions that I worked on – will ensure manufacturing of critical components are brought back home, create good-paying union jobs across the country, and prevent supply chain disruptions from impacting us in the future. This bill will help expand American capacity to produce the key components for so many of the products we rely on every single day – and in the process, will make our economy more competitive, reliable, and sustainable. This bill addresses the chip shortage by appropriating funding toward producing semiconductors in America. It aims to fix the supply chain by building more critical components in America – strengthening American manufacturing and protecting our national security. Finally, it ensures we continue to lead in scientific research by maximizing the American talent pool and diversifying our STEM workforce. I don’t know about you, but all that makes me want to dance! = The America Competes Act passed the House earlier this month, and I look forward to it passing the Senate and getting to President Biden’s desk ASAP. Thank you! LBR = | Congresswoman Lisa Blunt Rochester is a Democrat representing the First State, Delaware. She served as the National Co-Chair of the Biden-Harris campaign and Co-Chair of the DCCC ‘Red to Blue’ program. Lisa is running for reelection to continue fighting for our health care, leading the charge toward environmental justice, and advocating for working families like hers. **= Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress PO BOX 9767 Wilmington, DE 19810 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. **

Friends — I’m running for the U.S. Senate in North Carolina because I believe we need to send a fighter to Washington who will put the people first. As a judge and the first African American woman to serve as Chief Justice of the North Carolina Supreme Court, I’ve seen firsthand how laws made in Washington impact — and too often fail — working families. When I first decided to run to try to flip North Carolina’s open Senate seat, I wasn’t sure what to expect. But then, literally MINUTES after I announced, Adam, a student from Morganton chipped in $25. Not two minutes later, a higher ed administrator from Winston-Salem gave $100. In the next minute, Anna from Durham, a social worker, gave $50... and we were off. Since then tens of thousands of people have chipped into our campaign. It’s humbling. But now that Democrats are united behind our campaign and focused on the general election, we have our biggest challenge to-date in this race. Friend, the U.S. Postal Service delivers lifesaving prescriptions, groceries and even paychecks – and in election years like the one we just entered, it also delivers mail-in ballots to millions of voters. But when Trump was president, he kicked off a series of events that could spell DISASTER for the 2022 election:
**FIRST:** Trump BLOCKED USPS funding in the middle of the pandemic and handpicked the Board of Governors who selected an unqualified Trump megadonor, Louis DeJoy, to be postmaster general.
**THEN:** DeJoy started cutting USPS hours and facilities – delaying the delivery of Medicare prescriptions, Social Security benefits and essential groceries.
**NOW:****DeJoy is at it again, this time reducing efficiency and capacity ahead of the CRUCIAL midterm elections – putting vote-by-mail in serious danger!**
We need action NOW to remove DeJoy, save the United States Postal Service and protect voters' ability to be heard. **But we can't stop DeJoy without your grassroots support, and we need to hear from 54 more people in 18326 by midnight tonight. Please, friend, tell us now:**
**SHOULD LOUIS DEJOY BE REMOVED AS POSTMASTER GENERAL?**

subject: I'm Kevin McCarthy's Democratic opponent
body:
| _We are alerting Democrats about Marisa Wood -- a public school teacher and Democrat running a historic campaign to unseat GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy. To support Marisa Wood's campaign, [chip in here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41998626/331218921/883924314?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTViMThiNy1iMjkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lo-jyMUeIyJDhPkZVzraj2Wg8tEwcq0YGAciHPpo3NI=) We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/e115b8af-b291-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a/fa5b18b7-b291-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTViMThiNy1iMjkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lo-jyMUeIyJDhPkZVzraj2Wg8tEwcq0YGAciHPpo3NI=&id=124172018)._ Friend, In just a moment, I'm going to ask you to [**make a $3 contribution**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41998627/331218922/943178430?refcode=em-2.19.22-nopen-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTViMThiNy1iMjkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lo-jyMUeIyJDhPkZVzraj2Wg8tEwcq0YGAciHPpo3NI=) to our campaign to stop Kevin McCarthy from becoming Speaker of the House. Things have changed significantly in my race, so I hope you'll give me a chance to explain why this request is so crucial.

**Last week, we got word that another one of our primary opponents dropped out of the race. Soon after, we earned 100% of the vote from local Democratic delegates to be pre-endorsed by the California Democratic Party. This needs to be OUR movement, friend -- which is why I'm asking:

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: A Tale of Two Tax Plans – Update from the Mississippi Center for Public Policy
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/progressupdate-8132312?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,

**Mississippi needs a boost. To make our state properly competitive, we need to reduce the tax burden.**

The best way to get our state economy growing is to abolish the state income tax – like they did in Tennessee, Texas, and Florida.

**In this short video, we tell the tale of two different tax plans; one of which will boost our state and the other that won’t.**
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=7957395fb2&e=5703353baa)
---
**Click here to hear the Tale of Two Tax Plans!**
|
---
|
As Mississippi’s leading conservative think tank, we produce a steady stream of high-impact policy papers. **I am delighted that over 90,000 Mississippians have now read this report on the education paper we published a few days ago.**
---
|
---
|
In this year's legislative session lawmakers might not have done much to change the education system in our state. The fact that tens of thousands of Mississippians are interested in our policy proposals suggests to me that change is nevertheless coming.

Have a great weekend!

---
| |
---

Warm Regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO

Ps. With Spring on the way, I’m getting ready to start growing vegetables. My first efforts underway .....
---
|
---
---
|
---
| |
---
| _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=3a1eab6bee) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=3a1eab6bee).

name: Holly McCormack
subject: Protecting Our Veterans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Holly for Congress
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41998850/331219977/1254848285?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTk3YjA5Mi1iNTkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kOa_8ycbiqt_EkiwWlM2y_CJ742m1AeSWFzl6W2tPA8=&emci=3eced057-fe90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=5597b092-b591-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=23594672)
---
| | |
---
Peter – This week I spent some time talking with my father about all of the heartbreaking issues veterans, like himself, face. Veterans make up 6% of the U.S. population, yet they make up 8% of the homeless population. Nearly 1 million veterans live in poverty and more than half live with a disability. Our veterans come home with PTSD and no way to adjust to civilian life because they have systematically been denied access to resources, jobs, housing, and healthcare. “Delay, Deny, Wait until they die” – the famous battle cry protested by our veterans who are forced to once again fight, only this time on home soil and for life-saving care at the VA. **75% of all initial applicants for coverage are denied**. Our VA system is failing and our government is failing to act, leaving our veterans to suffer. In GA-14, **we have NO VA hospital and NO veterans’ cemetery for a population of over 64,000 vets.** Many of us in Northwest Georgia have seen firsthand the damage that comes from under-resourced areas, because we have family members and friends who aren’t able to access the care they need. For decades we’ve been hearing that our veterans matter, that we will do better – yet nothing has changed. We know that our wounded soldiers with mental and physical disabilities are not given adequate healthcare and are left on the streets to die. This problem is not going to disappear, and with a huge veterans demographic in Northwest Georgia, **people are quite literally begging our representative to help. ** My dad and his service inspired me to run, and talking to the veterans in my District is what keeps me going. We need to win this race, not only to make a difference, but because the lack of resources leaves us no other choice. **[Chip in today if you’re ready to fight for our veterans.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41998851/331219978/-804235033?refcode=em0219&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTk3YjA5Mi1iNTkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kOa_8ycbiqt_EkiwWlM2y_CJ742m1AeSWFzl6W2tPA8=)** We owe a debt to those who’ve placed their lives on the line to protect our freedom as Americans, and we have to do better to provide for their care and to honor their sacrifices. Keep doing the good work,Holly McCormack.
---
| | |
---
[**DONATE**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41998852/331219979/-804235033?refcode=em0219&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTk3YjA5Mi1iNTkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kOa_8ycbiqt_EkiwWlM2y_CJ742m1AeSWFzl6W2tPA8=)

My campaign for Congress isn’t just about defeating Elise Stefanik in November -- it’s about policies that will help reduce expenses for working families, expand access to healthcare, invest in our infrastructure, secure our nation, and so many more issues that impact our lives every day.
| Hi there!

Did you see this email from Matt?

This campaign is about NY-21 and ensuring everyone has a seat at the table. We’ve been let down for too long, and with your help, we can win in November and finally have a Representative who will work for us, instead of sowing partisan hatred to advance their personal ambition.

**[Please, make a donation today to help us flip this seat in November. We are only $1,092 away from reaching our goal before midnight tonight!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41977349/331149004/935293314?amount=25&refcode=MC_EM_FR_3MO_220219_1_3&refcode2=58912439-8c91-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODkxMjQzOS04YzkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d9sqZc6oO4p8e7DLsByhQVMUzM9DV5ddvbQPYWT3Tsc=)**

The fall of Afghanistan could have been prevented from the start. Please see a note from one of our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe visit this [link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=78eb8f7bb78b4fe8a4282b4a3f8c3896&_e=sPGcWwEkLqyD2X_CsM7GE38hEhfHpna5CJ7ZK5R_aTtmqCK3DYKmQCnyfzUArZsyJ9bFgVixgmogz801t3NyUUAYddUkgFx-nhmhPytZBmL-feHzhgXXMz_EoxSRO58d-bSwuOhdepUzmEJqkktUyHJirUtGkv8BqNpQz-8cY1SJ8EDpoke4tgB9CGOfHgb3kNyX9jcaYSVtv-rjGFb9liWXyudfMRA1OCLQMBmlohm7LGxNvxUODSuovLpraIPXy170BFPQ6IR95wYOUdc_fkEapEh7WFL3n62igwsn89v830fQgZ8ZzgdKWUOErhxLXavgqgVrQ4laSTQWtASz39T8QpGaJwYssCEiPUj01e3YTuIok6Q1-3LqOhSco0ovIPy4MkZwsuI-LSSIIkCeFT3rzegFgdxaNcEz0lGF3P_i-ZIwj9MXDmaTw9JV10BJ7fVs5AoLQJkgIEAA-pfJbCESoKOH-iv-WtVop0PIY5I%3D) [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=78eb8f7bb78b4fe8a4282b4a3f8c3896&_e=-Uqm0J6Zr5nKISddF2esKnbayaCON3pbcUE2j5SId3XL-42huK3pjNWcYX26VxIio8_uycAb0ArVjTPXmQzWzkG_ZSqDaC4VV3QClpLiQ8-_QePgV7e2P6-7pJ9IN688sFJVYlmIQxB33md_MHzeQ1u2YBAP-02imuvLGAUOK2Jl5TUBpZP2xaWbzh7jSn8VO37_Cx1f7HlTUM9D9p03o_kAL4qBmS-OGOJwqvVmim9sP-baVcQGrvgAvSZYFqlhqjOUEdoaA4BULZsx6fUvKiQmEoPbf4ITosLxuIDfAAtVwZdxCuX7BbZa_hBxn2bY9FY4miqRGq5tADchacTj_B-FvLQKSt-8nFkmBs-GGvCbLm70fppOjeb0-LKVDO8F92PyQnDUkzgrzkxjzBg6Nama51iZa_Dn6lwEkft-tIN024DO0H3BfAOVuBNpi7D020rnmPZ4iPNe8oXPPHtiqj0HHhU5jL9JmKCG8drTyrqUdUF6nQdVwf046MIrqphW) The fall of Afghanistan was personal to me, Peter. I served in Afghanistan. I held the hands of little Afghan girls that we helped get back into school. I woke up at sunrise to render a 4-second delayed salute to the fallen men that I knew that gave their lives there. When the disastrous fall of Afghanistan happened in August I looked at the number of crises surrounding our nation, and something was reaffirmed... **_President Biden’s failed leadership stems from being a career politician with no skin in the game._** _He never served in the military..._ _He never led troops in battle and saluted fallen comrades..._ _He’s just another career politician making decisions that hurt our nation..._ **It was then that I had another 9/11 moment. I felt the call to serve my country... because a soldier runs to the fight, and the fight is now in the U.S. Senate.** Despite being a conservative outsider that’s never run for office, more donors supported my campaign in its first quarter than the career politicians that have been in the race far longer than me. [**SEND NEW LEADERS TO WASHINGTON**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=78eb8f7bb78b4fe8a4282b4a3f8c3896&_e=-Uqm0J6Zr5nKISddF2esKnbayaCON3pbcUE2j5SId3XL-42huK3pjNWcYX26VxIio8_uycAb0ArVjTPXmQzWzkG_ZSqDaC4VV3QClpLiQ8-_QePgV7e2P6-7pJ9IN688sFJVYlmIQxB33md_MHzeQ1u2YBAP-02imuvLGAUOK2Jl5TUBpZP2xaWbzh7jSn8VO37_Cx1f7HlTUM9D9p03o_kAL4qBmS-OGOJwqvVmim9sP-baVcQGrvgAvSZYFqlhqjOUEdoaA4BULZsx6fUvKiQmEoPbf4ITosLxuIDfAAuAYySvfgtxJkKF9_Klc6i6u3dh4K-OZeKl67U6biM6umUa-IPig0w8CFIY1aiJ7cNkG_hE96vR5h_JQ0IDixiXrbPpMpXv28ioD8a_BvomuIwqJzdjnXL1r1CMVBj5IpoGuNM5-rWd7NgSZqN9AXfFAztPQ1Fc-AplCcItL9aLPnIbavJTxspasLO42rSh57VFbLnzZFa5jjNqlwi5eeiC) That’s why I’m reaching out to you, Peter. **My name is Marjorie K. Eastman. I’m a veteran, military wife, mother, and businesswoman – and I’m running to represent North Carolina in the U.S. Senate.** [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=78eb8f7bb78b4fe8a4282b4a3f8c3896&_e=-Uqm0J6Zr5nKISddF2esKnbayaCON3pbcUE2j5SId3XL-42huK3pjNWcYX26VxIio8_uycAb0ArVjTPXmQzWzkG_ZSqDaC4VV3QClpLiQ8-_QePgV7e2P6-7pJ9IN688sFJVYlmIQxB33md_MHzeQ1u2YBAP-02imuvLGAUOK2Jl5TUBpZP2xaWbzh7jSn8VO37_Cx1f7HlTUM9D9p03o_kAL4qBmS-OGOJwqvVmim9sP-baVcQGrvgAvSZYFqlhqjOUEdoaA4BULZsx6fUvKiQmEoPbf4ITosLxuIDfAAtWPTCnNlvN8hg-IvDnzPe9zbIqwKqil0kAxNZxh7cEgcz3Zcn2ehkVwG1JZX9M7BTYXL6gWv3M3Udit9myzPT3IJK9bEibzTVSaruQ2aQAZF-wTuxYOemQhGIoW2x8K_iyAlOZLTFetCr-rIfT_F18AOmxTiZwulEeVtfiJ8VDlPbVPtts43oqMMHGX8mDDP6CPAYKkeGwl9s1PsSNGnVh) _When I look at the direction our country is heading in, I’m worried._ I’m concerned about career politicians’ inability to govern and protect our freedoms. **[< << STAND WITH MARJORIE >>>](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=78eb8f7bb78b4fe8a4282b4a3f8c3896&_e=-Uqm0J6Zr5nKISddF2esKnbayaCON3pbcUE2j5SId3XL-42huK3pjNWcYX26VxIio8_uycAb0ArVjTPXmQzWzkG_ZSqDaC4VV3QClpLiQ8-_QePgV7e2P6-7pJ9IN688sFJVYlmIQxB33md_MHzeQ1u2YBAP-02imuvLGAUOK2Jl5TUBpZP2xaWbzh7jSn8VO37_Cx1f7HlTUM9D9p03o_kAL4qBmS-OGOJwqvVmim9sP-baVcQGrvgAvSZYFqlhqjOUEdoaA4BULZsx6fUvKiQmEoPbf4ITosLxuIDfAAvKoDfgoEbg2K__vxDq-illKTbuXM82LoZegKavlVR0dR6Dk9RBJrTdcpSjg88QZ1QofpCJvi-rReG0jp18mNu8yvDoE2Vi9nOuALLlmiL8Ev6Zw8kFKxgH6wl5zbFDA5DkYHh5gba0pKPjQxVAA54kwwZrkYdfGmyg1CRH3Ep0GgaBVy9O7KFy_Pbi-smxgAgkjWeCqHRMLk0uD7kDUnjX)** When I enlisted in the Army, I took an oath to protect and defend those freedoms. That’s what I’ve always done – and will continue to do in the U.S. Senate. [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=78eb8f7bb78b4fe8a4282b4a3f8c3896&_e=-Uqm0J6Zr5nKISddF2esKnbayaCON3pbcUE2j5SId3XL-42huK3pjNWcYX26VxIio8_uycAb0ArVjTPXmQzWzkG_ZSqDaC4VV3QClpLiQ8-_QePgV7e2P6-7pJ9IN688sFJVYlmIQxB33md_MHzeQ1u2YBAP-02imuvLGAUOK2Jl5TUBpZP2xaWbzh7jSn8VO37_Cx1f7HlTUM9D9p03o_kAL4qBmS-OGOJwqvVmim9sP-baVcQGrvgAvSZYFqlhqjOUEdoaA4BULZsx6fUvKiQmEoPbf4ITosLxuIDfAAt6qfoQyKceCA01yCHORpqtQiW-ceUXIye0-sGVx7wFW9HTFs7GvlhKataTzs_doc1IEUCMVAVYlJWvdfBOob2AGwMvvv0VgUKA8cZVs8NnfarA7RpIwKoirQbOR6IHWzPzqKAJpbyL01ZKv3BsdErO6ZmPU_Gz6NPkajat_78O-zRHU0CdwgoX_4WxcgYCEEKOnZEaSUJR-tnLyaACBLGu) **I bring something unique to this race, Peter.** I’m the only combat veteran and conservative outsider. I _know_ what it means to go to war, to put your life on the line for your country.
**I’ve seen first-hand what freedom**** _truly_****costs – and that’s something that can’t be bought.** [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=78eb8f7bb78b4fe8a4282b4a3f8c3896&_e=-Uqm0J6Zr5nKISddF2esKnbayaCON3pbcUE2j5SId3XL-42huK3pjNWcYX26VxIio8_uycAb0ArVjTPXmQzWzkG_ZSqDaC4VV3QClpLiQ8-_QePgV7e2P6-7pJ9IN688sFJVYlmIQxB33md_MHzeQ1u2YBAP-02imuvLGAUOK2Jl5TUBpZP2xaWbzh7jSn8VO37_Cx1f7HlTUM9D9p03o_kAL4qBmS-OGOJwqvVmim9sP-baVcQGrvgAvSZYFqlhqjOUEdoaA4BULZsx6fUvKiQmEoPbf4ITosLxuIDfAAvfk6wvYgkOuglxsijYKG4KEKffvBxkAAghL5jvVtpb3gPTD_W5DzmLRC8E0PPN5u5ol7VbxgdZCn74mEps91rMmPJ-9W2jWISqzQ4v__YDp1pePj4n2b3C0H7YKofHV0vKRvU63hCjE7aYbHZiJes1CAPsgBjj0ChNr2iDZvRrnQREL2XS5Azt1yh2r-rLX9NnFejhsF13NeqRg5ld8_06) In the days and weeks after 9/11, I was like so many other Americans. I felt compelled to serve my country, and I have – through 10 years of intelligence service and two deployments. When I returned home, I faced a personal battle: my son was diagnosed with cancer. I quickly transitioned back into mom mode. My husband and I prayed every day, and eventually, my son beat his diagnosis. clean_body: The fall of Afghanistan could have been prevented from the start. Please see a note from one of our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe visit this The fall of Afghanistan was personal to me, Peter. I served in Afghanistan. I held the hands of little Afghan girls that we helped get back into school. I woke up at sunrise to render a 4-second delayed salute to the fallen men that I knew that gave their lives there. When the disastrous fall of Afghanistan happened in August I looked at the number of crises surrounding our nation, and something was reaffirmed... President Biden’s failed leadership stems from being a career politician with no skin in the game. He never served in the military... He never led troops in battle and saluted fallen comrades... He’s just another career politician making decisions that hurt our nation... It was then that I had another 9/11 moment. I felt the call to serve my country... because a soldier runs to the fight, and the fight is now in the U.S. Senate. Despite being a conservative outsider that’s never run for office, more donors supported my campaign in its first quarter than the career politicians that have been in the race far longer than me. That’s why I’m reaching out to you, Peter. My name is Marjorie K. Eastman. I’m a veteran, military wife, mother, and businesswoman – and I’m running to represent North Carolina in the U.S. Senate. When I look at the direction our country is heading in, I’m worried. I’m concerned about career politicians’ inability to govern and protect our freedoms. When I enlisted in the Army, I took an oath to protect and defend those freedoms. That’s what I’ve always done – and will continue to do in the U.S. Senate. I bring something unique to this race, Peter. I’m the only combat veteran and conservative outsider. I know what it means to go to war, to put your life on the line for your country. I’ve seen first-hand what freedom trulycosts – and that’s something that can’t be bought. In the days and weeks after 9/11, I was like so many other Americans. I felt compelled to serve my country, and I have – through 10 years of intelligence service and two deployments. When I returned home, I faced a personal battle: my son was diagnosed with cancer. I quickly transitioned back into mom mode. My husband and I prayed every day, and eventually, my son beat his diagnosis. I’ve stood by my husband and supported his military career while also working in the private and non-profit sector, all with their own unique challenges. All of these battles led me to this mission today. By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution If you've saved payment information with Revv, your donation will go through automatically. Our nation’s best days are ahead of us as long as our leaders are battle-tested and answer to the American people. Thank you, Marjorie K. Eastman | Use of Marjorie K. name: Senator Todd Young
subject: A fellow veteran
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for Congress, Inc
body:
You need to meet him... Please see a note from one of our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe visit this [link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=5c53c9550b874ab687d35e8e040874b4&_t=dbzr0w2vWs4ZoUCWUSQ3NB1k4OCAHtL1OFh_yctinrm5SXNdxFRAGQWxOGgrwDLwOqxnj0DQCh6loG5eHAgkY3Li3jtFzlUmSIlNU1M8oWJPegbBUUlxIslEpw3NyfL6y-BfW34yJdH_szKbeopC-eqyk2zKNRfCgzxdAU_rsFg%3D) | |
---
Hi Peter,

I've had the privilege of meeting a lot of great patriots over the yearsー _**but John James stands out as a true conservative and champion of the Constitution. **_

He's a fellow veteran with unmatched character and integrity.

John served as a U.S. Army Ranger and Apache Pilot completing multiple tours of duty in Iraq.

He never stopped serving his country and community. When he got back, he started a family and helped grow his family’s small businessー _**now 4 times bigger than when he started!**** **_

John, like myself, has unshakeable faith in the American Dream and believes we _can inspire the next generation into an era of success and prosperity_ , or _we can lose it all to a socialist future. _

**That’s why we NEED John in Congress fighting to Defend the American Dream and ensure it’s safekeeping for the next generation****ー[Peter](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=5c53c9550b874ab687d35e8e040874b4&_e=7g-p2BSSnKcWSHcqmbtoyryV2r6LhweaFWjAoWfFH9DXpW6iOvgo8AKkM0-2_MjxdmcnM5Ur31iW1oWsCzcA7WaoUfMBlIZWSMJloOSox0iFNHFxFMLK_qJZlrr_DpAsoo_qOb4wE_QILCE9nsq9jJr3GxKhcRosdQ4GhsjKydbNyYGVF1PQV5Ro2wSMEKQoUjlZ7v5T0r-P0cOCdF4_A1AP5i1wBsbBS4fS-eTaJvC61mI8Ik7w2L3uW5jyO5PRIb8CBOWg-TSiP44x73pYWo4jXtguDO6dP4lgxG3O8YdsYfp7drUZzc4f3ISF4Q_18nK83uE-d0nkOSffnk_naFo99lyd1YBzg8qb9gMTBT4r-mxmesw5uFOxjJrkNyWrq3P89Bg7qH6zhnICqJdFFzy_26oZm6UB9aKm4fhTUJNlSemsMieAJdlYMpHbf7SX9vNl0VFUHJMv6JTQyp05HiFjNZnl32p_YZIzWMD128dLYsScAFKLN7mPQi-mY0hB)**[**, will you chip in a small donation to send to John James to Congress >>**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=5c53c9550b874ab687d35e8e040874b4&_e=7g-p2BSSnKcWSHcqmbtoyryV2r6LhweaFWjAoWfFH9DXpW6iOvgo8AKkM0-2_MjxdmcnM5Ur31iW1oWsCzcA7WaoUfMBlIZWSMJloOSox0iFNHFxFMLK_qJZlrr_DpAsoo_qOb4wE_QILCE9nsq9jJr3GxKhcRosdQ4GhsjKydbNyYGVF1PQV5Ro2wSMEKQoUjlZ7v5T0r-P0cOCdF4_A1AP5i1wBsbBS4fS-eTaJvC61mI8Ik7w2L3uW5jyO5PRIb8CBOWg-TSiP44x73pYWituX-WXRYRA2E7zIzuivwbYAui8tkYCDk-QpCx6wSimA4ZFmubqa0TFLJEiHv0mz2cCJ9ixFHsWPFdMfAYCUHqyUXeXUKO_OBOrOmdiWFd-OLvIT3PRj200bXe8Yapo8FVil62mcVPVkrck3K7rE2vx1wRKEh6geMZzxQkKk5Rh1QNjYStQnoC4AelBRTi_LywrVDb0GnLBfP0eSqdJe2fmiOc7wTbbPwi5V45-AHJR)

clean_body: You need to meet him... Please see a note from one of our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe visit this | | Hi Peter, I've had the privilege of meeting a lot of great patriots over the yearsー but John James stands out as a true conservative and champion of the Constitution. He's a fellow veteran with unmatched character and integrity. John served as a U.S. Army Ranger and Apache Pilot completing multiple tours of duty in Iraq. He never stopped serving his country and community. When he got back, he started a family and helped grow his family’s small businessー now 4 times bigger than when he started! John, like myself, has unshakeable faith in the American Dream and believes we can inspire the next generation into an era of success and prosperity , or we can lose it all to a socialist future. That’s why we NEED John in Congress fighting to Defend the American Dream and ensure it’s safekeeping for the next generationー Thank you, Todd Young | | | Paid for by John James for Congress, Inc. | | P.O. name: Trump News HQ
subject: Don’t let them “cancel” American history
body:
I have a special gift for you—a set of unique notecards featuring pictures of the “Liberty Walk” statues found on the Hill
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zd3bdo7hdfkrj9hbum7bjjfpntvd75eflip7srr8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbr3bcr0scpr9pbjcmoj2tjlc5r3dcrm6mo78objmmomcd74c9qb6p9kmkp79ob76v970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti6lj39p5l6krr5cb66aob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5im4p77c9i69oh5u)
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9o5qo2ro94l9d5afdr5e4ds48fs8qma79mk14g0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c9ieeoj4cjh2bs) Friend of Liberty, I have a special gift for you—a set of unique notecards featuring pictures of the “Liberty Walk” statues found on the Hillsdale College campus. These beautiful cards include _George Washington_ and _Thomas Jefferson_ ... _Abraham Lincoln_ and _Frederick Douglass_ ... _Winston Churchill_ , _Margaret Thatcher_ , and _Ronald Reagan_. _All of these statues stand proudly on Hillsdale’s Michigan campus_ —one of the only institutions of higher learning that refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. You can view the cards at this secure link: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/get-your-liberty-walk-notecards](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zevs5l1lu6vnfds8gtsi8e5uobc9qb4rf4dq5hk0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c9ieeoj4cjh2bs)** Let the cards serve as a reminder to you of the vigilance and commitment needed to defend liberty—especially right now, a critical time for our country. **Sadly, several recent polls and events around the country show that increasing numbers of young Americans are being drawn to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty.** And the unrest in communities nationwide, where statues of our Founding Fathers are being vandalized or torn down, is another symptom of this underlying disease. What explains this development? As an educator and president of Hillsdale, I’ve been thinking about this for a long time. Here’s one primary reason... For decades, the “progressive” leftist academics who became dominant in most of America’s colleges and universities after the 1960s have been teaching a **biased** and **distorted** view of American history. _The New York Times’_ recent “1619 Project” is a prime example. According to the “1619 Project,” the key to understanding America is not freedom, but slavery—and the Project’s main goal is to inject this false teaching into the curricula of America’s K–12 schools. Imagine young minds in classrooms all over American learning this. Does it make you as concerned as it does me? And given this trend in American education, is it any wonder that our young people feel less of a patriotic attachment to our nation and are increasingly attracted—out of ignorance—to failed ideas such as socialism, ideas that are destructive of liberty? Another sign of the “progressive” Left’s influence is the continuing attempt to erase our American heritage by destroying monuments, renaming schools and streets, and censoring works of literature in the name of “political correctness.” The Left knows that it cannot remake society according to its ever-evolving idea of “progress” until it has “canceled” patriotism and hallowed out the idea that we should be grateful for our blessings to the great men and women of the past—many of whom are depicted on the cards I’d like to send you. **This is why we are engaging the Left on the battlefield of education ... and why your generous support is needed right away.** After all, those on the Left are extremely well-funded, thanks to liberal billionaires like George Soros and his ilk. **With the support of citizens like you—citizens who understand the importance of education to liberty—we are ramping up its outreach efforts on behalf of liberty, especially to our nation’s youth.** It is even more urgent that we do so in the face of efforts such as _The New York Times_ ’ “1619 Project” that undermine patriotism and lead to an increased pull toward socialism. Hillsdale is the only educational institution in America that is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens of all ages, from coast to coast, about America’s great heritage of liberty. **Your generous support today will...**
* **Expand** the circulation of _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s digest of liberty, to reach millions more Americans (you can also receive a free subscription of I _mprimis_ ...for life).
* **Send** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to schools across America, and to members of our armed forces, who have sworn to defend the Constitution.
* **Increase** the number of citizens (especially younger Americans) enrolling in Hillsdale’s free online courses such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope.”
* **Launch** and support more and more Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, returning excellence to American K-12 education and impacting thousands of our youngest citizens.

One other thing you should be aware of... As I mentioned, to maintain our independence, we do all of this liberty-defending work while refusing EVERY PENNY of government funding—even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY. So, your support is even more crucial to ensuring that future generations of Americans will be educated in American civics and prepared to defend freedom. **With a gift of $17.76 or more today to support educational outreach efforts that reach and teach millions, Hillsdale will send you a special notecard set featuring the statues on our “Liberty Walk.” The cards are a thank you for your support.** Supplies are limited, so please make your best tax-deductible gift right away. **You can view the cards and give your best tax-deductible gift of $17.76, $25, $50, $100, or even $250 or more by following the secure link below:** **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/get-your-liberty-walk-notecards](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zc2fu2nh4h01es8gkaa92e61dek3i0uopgt4u6qg_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c9ieeoj4cjh2bs)** After receiving your notecards, I hope you’ll send one to a young person you know, encouraging them to learn more about the Constitution and American history. You can even recommend that they take advantage of Hillsdale’s many free educational resources. The Left is going all out, as illustrated by _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project.” It is urgent that we engage forcefully on the battlefield of education ... which is why your support is needed today. **Because as always, our only sure defense is an educated citizenry prepared to defend liberty—no matter the cost.** Warm regards, Bill Gray Associate Vice President, National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

Hillsdale College,33 East College St, Hillsdale, MI, 49242, USA

You can view the cards at this secure link: Let the cards serve as a reminder to you of the vigilance and commitment needed to defend liberty—especially right now, a critical time for our country. Sadly, several recent polls and events around the country show that increasing numbers of young Americans are being drawn to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty. And the unrest in communities nationwide, where statues of our Founding Fathers are being vandalized or torn down, is another symptom of this underlying disease. What explains this development? As an educator and president of Hillsdale, I’ve been thinking about this for a long time. Here’s one primary reason... For decades, the “progressive” leftist academics who became dominant in most of America’s colleges and universities after the 1960s have been teaching a biased and distorted view of American history. The New York Times’ recent “1619 Project” is a prime example. According to the “1619 Project,” the key to understanding America is not freedom, but slavery—and the Project’s main goal is to inject this false teaching into the curricula of America’s K–12 schools. Imagine young minds in classrooms all over American learning this. Does it make you as concerned as it does me? And given this trend in American education, is it any wonder that our young people feel less of a patriotic attachment to our nation and are increasingly attracted—out of ignorance—to failed ideas such as socialism, ideas that are destructive of liberty? Another sign of the “progressive” Left’s influence is the continuing attempt to erase our American heritage by destroying monuments, renaming schools and streets, and censoring works of literature in the name of “political correctness.” The Left knows that it cannot remake society according to its ever-evolving idea of “progress” until it has “canceled” patriotism and hallowed out the idea that we should be grateful for our blessings to the great men and women of the past—many of whom are depicted on the cards I’d like to send you. This is why we are engaging the Left on the battlefield of education ... and why your generous support is needed right away. After all, those on the Left are extremely well-funded, thanks to liberal billionaires like George Soros and his ilk. With the support of citizens like you—citizens who understand the importance of education to liberty—we are ramping up its outreach efforts on behalf of liberty, especially to our nation’s youth. It is even more urgent that we do so in the face of efforts such as The New York Times ’ “1619 Project” that undermine patriotism and lead to an increased pull toward socialism. Hillsdale is the only educational institution in America that is reaching and teaching millions of citizens of all ages, from coast to coast, about America’s great heritage of liberty. Your generous support today will... Expand the circulation of Imprimis , Hillsdale’s digest of liberty, to reach millions more Americans (you can also receive a free subscription of I mprimis ...for life). Send millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to schools across America, and to members of our armed forces, who have sworn to defend the Constitution. Increase the number of citizens (especially younger Americans) enrolling in Hillsdale’s free online courses such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope.” Launch and support more and more Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, returning excellence to American K-12 education and impacting thousands of our youngest citizens. One other thing you should be aware of... As I mentioned, to maintain our independence, we do all of this liberty-defending work while refusing EVERY PENNY of government funding—even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY. So, your support is even more crucial to ensuring that future generations of Americans will be educated in American civics and prepared to defend freedom. With a gift of $17.76 or more today to support educational outreach efforts that reach and teach millions, Hillsdale will send you a special notecard set featuring the statues on our “Liberty Walk.” The cards are a thank you for your support. Supplies are limited, so please make your best tax-deductible gift right away. You can view the cards and give your best tax-deductible gift of $17.76, $25, $50, $100, or even $250 or more by following the secure link below: After receiving your notecards, I hope you’ll send one to a young person you know, encouraging them to learn more about the Constitution and American history. You can even recommend that they take advantage of Hillsdale’s many free educational resources. The Left is going all out, as illustrated by The New York Times’ “1619 Project.” It is urgent that we engage forcefully on the battlefield of education ... which is why your support is needed today. Because as always, our only sure defense is an educated citizenry prepared to defend liberty—no matter the cost. Warm regards, Bill Gray Associate Vice President, National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College Hillsdale College,33 East College St, Hillsdale, MI, 49242, USA If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Trumptrainnews, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Peter, I look for any chance to build a better, brighter New Mexico. **That’s why I was proud to sign cannabis legislation into law last year.**
Cannabis legalization will open up so many opportunities for New Mexicans. This law will create jobs in our state, generate more revenue for state and local governments and finally end the failed war on drugs – which has disproportionately harmed communities of color.
Legalizing cannabis is a win-win for our state: It allows both communities and individuals to thrive. **But I couldn’t have signed this bold, progressive law without careful deliberation and input from people like you.****** Before signing that bill into law, I convened a bipartisan working group on cannabis, researched legalization in other states and I directly asked supporters like YOU for advice, Peter.
**Now, I’m coming to you for advice again, Peter. Democrats have suggested federally legalizing cannabis throughout the U.S. – and I want to know where you stand. Please, tell me what you think before 11:59 p.m. tonight:**
| | **Should the U.S. federally legalize cannabis?**

| [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41999756/331224079/671940327?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1168-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTQyZjBkNC1iNjkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fOP7t4Y20JZVzvAn9s7U20BS5jHy5m0G-j7AFZti0YU=&emci=88f49b91-e890-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=7942f0d4-b691-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=24265352)

Michelle Lujan Grisham

subject: we pulled your membership record

body:
Please take a look:
| | |
---
Friend, with polling showing me _statistically tied_ with Marco Rubio, he is more vulnerable than ever – BUT we need the resources to compete with him if we want to win Florida's battleground race.

**That's why I just launched a major fundraising push to secure 10,000 Election Year Members. But with time running out before my midnight deadline, I'm falling massively short. **My team pulled your membership record, so please take a look:
| | **_SUPPORTER_ _RECORD_ **
---
SUPPORTER: dpwillis67@gmail.com
ELECTION YEAR MEMBER STATUS:** PENDING **
SUGGESTED CONTRIBUTION: $5
DEADLINE: 11:59 p.m.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41999889/331224633/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2462-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjQyZjBkNC1iNjkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ezJgRLP_zpTOmeZ5E0S6UftBYK3I0cU3ttuUxqo-n6A=)
---
| | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41999890/331224634/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2462-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjQyZjBkNC1iNjkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ezJgRLP_zpTOmeZ5E0S6UftBYK3I0cU3ttuUxqo-n6A=)
---
The pathway before me is tough: **Republicans have already sunk $10 million into on-the-ground organizing in Florida to keep our state red permanently. **Marco Rubio and the GOP know that if we win here, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to keep control of the Senate. Oregonians don’t need any more bought and paid for politicians in Congress. We need progressive fighters like Matt who serve the working and middle class, not the ultra-wealthy. Every move we make from now through Election Day matters. That’s why we need your help to build an unstoppable grassroots coalition and come out on top. The choice is ours, friend. We know what we have to do. subject: Tell us: Why are you on Team Nan?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nan Whaley
body:
We’re checking in to make sure that our campaign is focusing on what you need and want.

Team,
For too long, Ohio politics have been about the voice of the chosen few – whatever corrupt governor and politicians were in power at the time along with their special interest friends.
Nan is running to change that. The issues that matter to you are what matter to her. We’re checking in to make sure that our campaign is focusing on what you need and want.

name: Letitia James
subject: Need your thoughts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42000098/331226029/-805880016?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk328-su-warmup11&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzRkYWQ1Mi1iYTkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Uknm8suZSnoZudoJSAdQbkoGUslT81VWc8mOC1LJK1U=&emci=38592d5d-d490-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=a74dad52-ba91-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=25369504)
---
Peter, I didn't grow up with power or privilege.
And that's just one reason I've always been driven to fight for the people to ensure justice and equality for all. I want to make sure that your voice – your thoughts, concerns, and priorities – are _always_ included in my work.
Across the country, the GOP is working to systematically dismantle our constitutional rights – to vote, to choose, to live without debt – brick by brick. But together, we can put a stop to their full-scale attack on our democracy. That's why I'm reaching out to you today, Peter, to make sure your voice is heard: **I need at least 1,000 members of this team to share their input with me in a quick survey, and I'm still missing your response. **
**[Will you take our survey right now? It won't take more than 60 seconds, and it’ll be such a huge help as I continue to fight for what matters most to you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42000100/331226031/-805880016?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk328-su-warmup11&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzRkYWQ1Mi1iYTkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Uknm8suZSnoZudoJSAdQbkoGUslT81VWc8mOC1LJK1U=&emci=38592d5d-d490-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=a74dad52-ba91-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=25369504)**
We have so many critical fights ahead of us, Peter, and I want you by my side as I fight to protect the earth for generations to come; to expand access to the ballot box for all communities; to put an end to the student debt crisis in this country once and for all. I am dedicated to each and every fight, large or small, and I know that you are, too.
**But I need to make sure that I know what really matters to you, which is why I'm asking you to take a few minutes to share what's on your mind. **
**[Please take just a minute to share your thoughts, priorities, and concerns with me in a quick survey. I will continue to fearlessly fight for the people, but I need you to add your voice.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42000102/331226033/-805880016?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk328-su-warmup11&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzRkYWQ1Mi1iYTkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Uknm8suZSnoZudoJSAdQbkoGUslT81VWc8mOC1LJK1U=&emci=38592d5d-d490-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=a74dad52-ba91-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=25369504)**
Thank you so much for staking your claim in this critical fight,

Letitia
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/38592d5d-d490-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a/a74dad52-ba91-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzRkYWQ1Mi1iYTkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Uknm8suZSnoZudoJSAdQbkoGUslT81VWc8mOC1LJK1U=&id=128810098) James for NY

name: By 10 AM tomorrow
subject: To: President Joseph R. Biden
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Sending our thanks >>
| TEXT JOIN TO 50224 TO GET IMPORTANT ACTION ALERTS FROM VOTER PROTECTION PROJECT! [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/128?t=1&akid=1299%2E878179%2EzPTuKE)
---
Team: With the one year anniversary of President Biden’s inauguration in the rear-view mirror, we need to reach out and show our gratitude.

**He has shown such poise and leadership while saving our country from a historic pandemic, and repairing the damage caused by Donald Trump.**

But despite all his accomplishments, he is being mercilessly attacked by far-right agitators who only want to destroy his accomplishments. [So we’re sending a letter to share our thanks for all of President Biden’s hard work during his first year in office. We’re sending this letter tomorrow at 10 AM SHARP. SIGN NOW, Friend! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/6127?t=8&akid=1299%2E878179%2EzPTuKE) | [Donate $1 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/6128?t=10&akid=1299%2E878179%2EzPTuKE)
---
**TO:** President Joe Biden
**FROM:** A Grateful American
**RE:** HAPPY ONE YEAR!

**We cannot begin to tell you the sense of relief we felt watching you take the presidential oath of office.**

It has been so wonderful to see civility return to the Oval Office and to _finally_ have a President that is willing to fight for working folks and deliver the change we’ve been crying out for over the last four years.

**And my goodness have you delivered on your campaign promises! From the historic American Rescue Plan, to the Bipartisan Infrastructure Bill, to leading an unprecedented economic recovery – we’re SO grateful!**

**But I know that despite your accomplishments, you continuously face unhinged attacks from disgraceful MAGA Republicans.**

[I hope you know that there are MILLIONS of us across the country that stand with you. That’s why I’m signing this card and chipping in $1 to Voter Protection Project to show that we support you and your administration SO much. »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/6128?t=12&akid=1299%2E878179%2EzPTuKE) | [Donate $1 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/6128?t=14&akid=1299%2E878179%2EzPTuKE)
---
I am AMAZED at all you have been able to do for the American people in just your first year as President.

_Joe, you've led us through a pandemic, a massive economic recovery, sharp political division, and SAVED our Democracy from the brink of peril._

[Congratulations on such a successful first year of your presidency. We know that next year will be even more successful thanks to your leadership! Thank you, thank you, thank you! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/6128?t=16&akid=1299%2E878179%2EzPTuKE)
Regards,

**_xx A Grateful American_**
[Donate $1 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/6128?t=18&akid=1299%2E878179%2EzPTuKE)
---
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

[](ckq.io/eguhtk)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To ending partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=2&akid=1299%2E878179%2EzPTuKE). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=3&akid=1299%2E878179%2EzPTuKE).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=4&akid=1299%2E878179%2EzPTuKE) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=19&akid=1299%2E878179%2EzPTuKE). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=5&akid=1299%2E878179%2EzPTuKE)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=6&akid=1299%2E878179%2EzPTuKE)

subject: Kim's working to save the USPS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
From delivering lifesaving prescription medications and paychecks, to Social Security benefits and mail-in ballots, the United States Postal Service provides a vital service to Americans across the country. But to this day, Trump-appointed Postmaster General Louis DeJoy is continuing his work to sabotage the USPS. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42000598/331230095/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDI2ZGE4MS1iZTkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nMgJpcm3bplMNgSgSTjIm1feJMEPJfOMYlQC3qfk4dc=&emci=f49e76af-db90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=7d26da81-be91-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

From delivering lifesaving prescription medications and paychecks, to Social Security benefits and mail-in ballots, the United States Postal Service provides a vital service to Americans across the country. But to this day, Trump-appointed Postmaster General Louis DeJoy is continuing his work to sabotage the USPS.

Since being appointed, DeJoy has increased rates, slowed down services, and implemented changes to try to delay mail-in voting during the 2020 election. With millions of Americans relying on the essential services the USPS provides, Kim is taking action to make sure the USPS works for you.

**That's why Kim was proud to help pass the Postal Service Reform Act in the House last week.** This bipartisan legislation will help increase transparency, save the federal government $1.5 billion over ten years, and require the postal service to deliver mail at least six days a week. Now we need the Senate to pass this legislation to ensure the USPS can continue to serve Americans for years to come.

name: Freedom Alerts
subject: Biden bans avocados
body:
...Here’s what you need to know
| |
---
| | Lethal drugs like Fentanyl cross our border everyday, but
Joe Biden has made it clear that’s not his priority. Instead, his administration has declared an import stop on _**Mexican avocados.**_
---
| | | [ ](http://email.mail.freedomdefense.net/c/eJxdUMtqwzAQ_Br5FmM9_Dr40DbNIaXQQ3rISSjSOhFIsrHkhvTruw5OCwWxaGdXo5kxHStLqts2sx0rGB7a0rIQnOa656pqCsqFFoWmlIjCK-vyfgIwgzfQQ4iQB0jZpevZyYhKsLJRZd0w0L1C3rKCWpcNr3nmuktKYyT8ibAdnnS1KcGU68Fjtx2CcmZ_mGY_7icEYlJpjnihouWcC0F5wxoqaFG2hO_m5KUHY2dP-BYWWYRVCxiHedKA4Mk0SglUswnaSeVHZ_vbuqSxVfYccO3hebMUebIGgjypEKX6GrQyQ5SrXakcTAlbIxdt4CBGJHowDiFBSEiIv22Ot6dDXX--faC1SgZnDQ7-gRdrMIzts3-_wL7Nps6MV-ucjVWNQZ_vSWM22aq8I_UzYez-irF7iuzPIq-Om-8pvC4j9oI13Ub43Vsp8jUnRurtD1xEneo)
---

That's right - NBC News reported that a recent poll has our campaign pulling ONE POINT ahead of the Democrat incumbent in Georgia - 49% to 48%!

While this is fantastic news, there are some important points to consider:
1. This poll shows the strength of the campaign we're building, but we're still more than eight months away from Election Day. A lot can - and will - happen between now and November 8.
2. In some states, you can win an election with a plurality like 49%. But in Georgia, we must get a majority of the votes to win, so we still have hard work to do to get over 50%.
3. We are taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum building for our campaign, but we know it will take an incredible amount of sweat equity to win this race.

We are taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum building for our campaign, but we know it will take an incredible amount of sweat equity to win this race. We need 500 donations before midnight tonight to keep pace with this week's goal. If polls are this tight eight months out from Election Day, then we fully expect this race is going to be a grueling fight to the finish. Even NBC News, which is not known for their fair and balanced reporting, acknowledges that this is going to be one of the MOST COMPETITIVE RACES IN THE NATION. We've already seen the Democrats use this poll to motivate their supporters and raise more money, so there is no time to waste. Please donate $3 or more to our campaign right now. Thank you for your support, Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

clean_body: We are investing early with grassroots outreach and it is paying off! | | | Team, Incredible news: we blew past 50,000 phone calls to voters in IL-7! In fact, by the end of this weekend we’ll be close to 60,000. We made the decision to invest early in voter contact, and it is paying off. Every week, we are talking to voters who haven’t heard from their representative in decades, if at all. Voters who are ready for change. Want to talk to them about making this real change together? Talking to more voters, more times, is how we win. Period. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Rep Danny Davis has the Chicago Machine behind him, not to mention thousands of dollars of corporate money.But what Danny Davis doesn’t have is all of us, the people. The people are ready. They just need to know they have a choice, and we are going to knock every door, and call every phone until they do. In solidarity, Kina Collins | To give by check: Kina Collins for Congress 901 Lake Street, Unit 4093 Oak Park, IL 60301

body:
Dr. Bud Pierce is determined to create a government that supports the great people of Oregon, not one that neglects our safety, our businesses, and our future.

| | | | | | |

| Peter,
Dr. Bud Pierce is determined to create a government that supports the great people of Oregon, not one that neglects our safety, our businesses, and our future.
He wants to know what the most pressing issue is on the minds of everyday Americans like you!
---
| | | [TAKE THE SURVEY!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rE7v8A1FfKJxWAUmnde9c5c5gKLhzAp-PSKTB4wmCAdC93aAkGI6KXZwFoOSvqV86M0NXFt6bF88175CFcqoLwEI0SqUQl0lP9HMG-MVfnXPHNB3EPUeKkLSK630vFA6pzYLyAtNSF7iRbhSfMI5WCZifgO2tSCJXHrZoxLwHeZ_SFSN1IxchxZTksEhk-r5iTs4T3dOIU4N2bRlZBOD_A==&c=hfYUNlQq-UUbGV8D8N-bVBH1pJqpiApaXe1EYx1j21o8gFcEoRFzuQ==&ch=0IHb8VO-RYApwZvkpy2GKzu52PjT_P3zekj0AReccF3X_f7AWNbYkg==)

An increasing number of homeless citizens are sleeping on the streets in the capital city of Salem. Small businesses have been forced to shut their doors.
Let Dr. Pierce know which of these issues, or any other pressing matter, should be prioritized the most. name: John King
subject: This morning
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer
body:
Less than 25 miles from where my great-grandfather, Charles King, and his family were enslaved.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42001245/331234659/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220219-b1_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220219-b1_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220219&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=8693b678-c691-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjkzYjY3OC1jNjkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XYjH-e3GfJcfej882PeczlFF6p8f9FpjDof3COX6JfI=)
---
| Peter, This morning, I sat with my family at our kitchen table in Silver Spring, Maryland, less than 25 miles from where my great-grandfather, Charles King, and his family were enslaved in Gaithersburg. My ancestors could have never imagined that in just three generations, I would serve as U.S. Secretary of Education under the first Black president. We have always been a family of firsts. In 1894, my grandmother was one of the earliest graduates of the University of Maryland Eastern Shore. After that, my uncle was a Tuskegee Airman, one of the first Black combat pilots in the Army. A few years later, my Uncle Dolly was one of our country’s first Black basketball players to integrate into the professional league, and my father served as New York City’s first Black deputy superintendent. Because my ancestors lived for a future they could not see and public schools provided generations of my family with the support to succeed, my daughters and I are here today and thriving. My family’s story is one of inequality and progress, just like the history of our state. My family background and the role public schools played in my life when both of my parents passed away inspired me to work to better not just my life, but the lives of those around me. **That’s why I am running to be the first Black governor of Maryland — so I can fight for those who have too often been ignored, and to ensure a more equitable and just future for all of us._[Will you join me today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42001246/331234660/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220219-b1_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220219-b1_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220219&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=8693b678-c691-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjkzYjY3OC1jNjkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XYjH-e3GfJcfej882PeczlFF6p8f9FpjDof3COX6JfI=)_** I am ready to get to work, but I need grassroots support from people like you, Peter.
---

clean_body: Less than 25 miles from where my great-grandfather, Charles King, and his family were enslaved. | = | Peter, This morning, I sat with my family at our kitchen table in Silver Spring, Maryland, less than 25 miles from where my great-grandfather, Charles King, and his family were enslaved in Gaithersburg. My ancestors could have never imagined that in just three generations, I would serve as U.S. Secretary of Education under the first Black president. We have always been a family of firsts. In 1894, my grandmother was one of the earliest graduates of the University of Maryland Eastern Shore. After that, my uncle was a Tuskegee Airman, one of the first Black combat pilots in the Army. A few years later, my Uncle Dolly was one of our country’s first Black basketball players to integrate into the professional league, and my father served as New York City’s first Black deputy superintendent. Because my ancestors lived for a future they could not see and public schools provided generations of my family with the support to succeed, my daughters and I are here today and thriving. My family’s story is one of inequality and progress, just like the history of our state. My family background and the role public schools played in my life when both of my parents passed away inspired me to work to better not just my life, but the lives of those around me. That’s why I am running to be the first Black governor of Maryland — so I can fight for those who have too often been ignored, and to ensure a more equitable and just future for all of us.= I am ready to get to work, but I need grassroots support from people like you, Peter. | = Thank you for your continued support, John King * | | = Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer John King for Governor PO Box 8429 Silver Spring, MD 20907 United States | | | ---|---|--- = = If you would like to learn more about John King's historic campaign for Maryland governor, text PROGRESS to 48178 or visit our . name: Mondaire Jones
subject: President Biden must cancel student debt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#

Friend,
With the stroke of a pen, President Biden can use his executive authority to cancel student loan debt.
Our federal government has the authority to liberate millions of people from this financial burden and give them the opportunity to start families and participate in our economy through home ownership and launching small businesses.
**[Federal student loan payments have been paused for close to two years, and now it's time for President Biden to use his executive authority to permanently cancel them. Please join me in calling on the President to do the right thing and cancel student debt.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41992850/331193151/-596609241?refcode=AU_MLJ_FR_GEN_PET_AC_20220219_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmVjZTVmOC05YzkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qRvbMofHm_g0K-ZOZ2z5ugF13zbIge-qKpUpUt8bCJM=&emci=220e5762-ac8d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=8fece5f8-9c91-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=24719896)**
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41992852/331193153/-596609241?refcode=AU_MLJ_FR_GEN_PET_AC_20220219_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmVjZTVmOC05YzkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qRvbMofHm_g0K-ZOZ2z5ugF13zbIge-qKpUpUt8bCJM=&emci=220e5762-ac8d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=8fece5f8-9c91-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=24719896)**
It is important to acknowledge that student debt cancellation is also a racial justice issue — Black Americans owe nearly twice as much as white Americans.
For many, higher education is a pathway to upward mobility, but it often requires Black families to borrow more money than their white counterparts to pursue their education.
By canceling student debt, we can narrow the racial wealth gap and provide immediate relief to millions of Americans who are struggling with rising inflation, stagnant wages, and increasing education costs.
**[Before the pause on federal student loans is lifted in May, President Biden must cancel student loan debt. Please join me in urging the White House to help an entire generation of young people and cancel student debt.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41992855/331193157/-596609241?refcode=AU_MLJ_FR_GEN_PET_AC_20220219_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmVjZTVmOC05YzkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qRvbMofHm_g0K-ZOZ2z5ugF13zbIge-qKpUpUt8bCJM=&emci=220e5762-ac8d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=8fece5f8-9c91-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=24719896)**
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41992858/331193160/-596609241?refcode=AU_MLJ_FR_GEN_PET_AC_20220219_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmVjZTVmOC05YzkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qRvbMofHm_g0K-ZOZ2z5ugF13zbIge-qKpUpUt8bCJM=&emci=220e5762-ac8d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=8fece5f8-9c91-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=24719896)**
Everyone deserves to receive a quality education in this country without having tens of thousands of dollars in debt. I will not give up on my efforts to get our President to do the right thing, and I hope you will stand with me in this fight.
Onward,
Mondaire

clean_body: Friend, With the stroke of a pen, President Biden can use his executive authority to cancel student loan debt. Our federal government has the authority to liberate millions of people from this financial burden and give them the opportunity to start families and participate in our economy through home ownership and launching small businesses. It is important to acknowledge that student debt cancellation is also a racial justice issue — Black Americans owe nearly twice as much as white Americans. For many, higher education is a pathway to upward mobility, but it often requires Black families to borrow more money than their white counterparts to pursue their education. By canceling student debt, we can narrow the racial wealth gap and provide immediate relief to millions of Americans who are struggling with rising inflation, stagnant wages, and increasing education costs. Everyone deserves to receive a quality education in this country without having tens of thousands of dollars in debt. I will not give up on my efforts to get our President to do the right thing, and I hope you will stand with me in this fight. Onward, Mondaire **= | | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Mondaire For Congress c/o Blue Wave Political Partners 499 S. name: Geoff Diehl
subject: Reminder: Be a delegate to the Republican State Convention
body:
Please show your support for Geoff Diehl for Governor.
| | | |
---
Be a delegate to the Republican State Convention!
Click below to watch Geoff's video message to Republican activists.
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010g81GnP30DnEbd4cDYuqkw_2svUcug_AbiWUKllK4fsw_W2VvO6sOZqjrujidCBvhtxGe9Nz_G-0XbTPVWM39_uLor3iwtIXdUfc_7OAyDXUOKTL9xD14dfkcpc-QKjCnvWIdIhRSZ24NdOV2y1ixg==&c=l96zfavd41sXQcTp1h6-Ch9TGzXICl4hzMOLdN5g1E8o3K9c_bNJPA==&ch=CHLHItCZokAz2VkHfP7S0Yyaofs2Vri-_3oUrN_iljQBLmrSt0KCLQ==)
---
| Hi everyone, it's Geoff Diehl.
Every four years, activists in our party get together to nominate statewide candidates for office. They're the heart and soul of our party, and they get to decide who will be on the ballot for the State Primary in September, and who will be our party's nominee for each Constitutional Office, including Governor.
This year's Republican Convention will be held on May 21 in Springfield. As a candidate for Governor, I'm asking you to get involved and volunteer to be a delegate at the Convention. It promises to be an exciting event for everyone.
Becoming a delegate is easy. This month, town and ward committees across our state are holding caucuses to elect delegates to represent their community. All you need to do is show up and ask to be elected. If chosen to serve, you'll be contacted by Republican party officials next month with details about how to sign up.
When you're there, I am hoping that you will cast your vote for me to be your next Governor. I am proud to represent our party and its ideals, and I am working hard to represent you.
If you'd like to find out more about me and my campaign for Governor, and for more information about how to serve as a convention delegate, please visit [www.GeoffDiehl.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010g81GnP30DnEbd4cDYuqkw_2svUcug_AbiWUKllK4fsw_W2VvO6sORLct6FRoqyje5ZmOyl1TlFD_QjqA7-D_-4GLFXb_MCfeCoSng5g3Y8s55CBiAUJwP4hBEEsmYJfsKEBXHvQLTqJjGo_0C28Ag==&c=l96zfavd41sXQcTp1h6-Ch9TGzXICl4hzMOLdN5g1E8o3K9c_bNJPA==&ch=CHLHItCZokAz2VkHfP7S0Yyaofs2Vri-_3oUrN_iljQBLmrSt0KCLQ==).
Thank you.
---
