name: Erica Smith
subject: I’m running against an insurrectionist.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
[1]Erica Smith

,

On January 6th, 2021, I was teaching my students, trying to distract them
from the fact that an angry mob was invading the halls of Congress.

On the other hand, here’s what my Republican opponent, Sandy Smith, was
doing:

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/34986?refcode=em20220219-901&t=1001&akid=901%2E3698%2EXwLOaq ][IMG]

On January 6th, Sandy Smith was at the Capitol — proudly showing her
support for Donald Trump, supporting the violence, and participating in
the intimidation.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/34986?refcode=em20220219-901&t=1002&akid=901%2E3698%2EXwLOaq ]Sandy Smith is an insurrectionist — and that’s just the start. Can you
make a contribution of $5 or more to our campaign today to
help us defeat Sandy Smith and make sure the NC-02 House seat stays blue?

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/34986?refcode=em20220219-901&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=901%2E3698%2EXwLOaq ]Donate $5

Here’s more about what we’re up against. Sandy Smith:

* Has already been endorsed by far-right Republicans including Madison
Cawthorn, Paul Gosar, and General Michael Flynn.
* Calls me a “communist” for my commitment to progressive policies that
will support and uplift working people in North Carolina and beyond.
* Opposes both a minimum wage increase and universal healthcare.
* Has #ProTrump #ProWall and #MAGA in her Twitter bio.

It’s absolutely critical that we defeat Sandy Smith and protect this
proudly Democratic seat. If Sandy Smith wins this seat she would be an
immediate threat to our razor-thin Democratic majority in the House.

But we have an even bigger plan for 2022 that Sandy Smith just can’t
replicate. I know that fighting this race the right way and reaching out
to voters in every community across North Carolina, refusing fossil fuel
and corporate PAC money, and supporting policies — like universal
broadband, universal healthcare, reproductive rights, and bold climate
action — are the only way to win. [ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/34986?refcode=em20220219-901&t=1022&akid=901%2E3698%2EXwLOaq ]Can you help me get there by
donating $5 today? Every bit helps.

In solidarity,

Erica

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/34986?refcode=em20220219-901&t=1023&akid=901%2E3698%2EXwLOaq ][IMG]

Contribute to Erica's campaign:https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20220219-901-footer&t=1024&refcode2=901_3698_XwLOaq&akid=901%2E3698%2EXwLOaq

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ericaforus.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=901%2E3698%2EXwLOaq

PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

Hey Peter — it’s Saturday, so just three quick things from us today:
1. Campaign finance filings were released this month, confirming that Bill Lee is running a campaign for corporations, special interests, and his super-wealthy friends.

2. Our campaign is for ALL Tennesseans, which puts us at a _massive_ disadvantage since we rely on grassroots supporters giving $25, $50, or $100 at a time. **We’re not taking a dime in corporate PAC money, because we know how that influence corrupts politicians and leaves working families behind.**

3. To start closing the gap between this grassroots movement and Lee’s corporate-backed, _we set a $25,000 goal that we have to reach by the end of the month._

With our wide base of support from thousands of regular Tennesseans who are ready to change, we know we can hit this critical goal if everyone who can chips in. **Will you join us and make a donation today?**
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

body:
Will you answer Mark’s urgent call?
#

**We are nine days away from the end of our critical February fundraising deadline and we’re falling well short of our fundraising goals. So Mark’s reaching out with an URGENT call to action:**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-feb22?refcode=em220219-1-15&t=1&refcode2=2147_6688874_rj37Dz&akid=2147%2E6688874%2Erj37Dz)
[**Will you answer Mark’s call and make a contribution of $3 or whatever you can afford so we can hit our goals, defend this seat, and keep Mark in the Senate? It all adds up when we’re all chipping in.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-feb22?refcode=em220219-1-15&t=2&refcode2=2147_6688874_rj37Dz&akid=2147%2E6688874%2Erj37Dz)
* * *
This is important, friends:
**First,** CNN said that Mark was one of the most vulnerable senators up for re-election this year.
**Then,** Donald Trump came to Arizona and said that taking back America starts with kicking Mark Kelly the hell out of the United States Senate.
**Now,** we’re facing millions and millions of dollars in attack ads from corporate special interest groups and a Mitch McConnell-backed dark money group.
There is NO ROOM FOR ERROR IN THESE GOALS.
And because Mark isn’t taking a dime of corporate PAC money, he needs your help. Because these goals are NOT arbitrary.
**Please — can Mark Kelly count on you to make a contribution of $3 or whatever you can afford to help us hit our February fundraising goals? We have to catch up... and FAST.**

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pfaff for Congress This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail
body:
My team and I will be looking over these responses tonight. We’re looking forward to hearing from you!

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42001525/331236201/-1995343361?refcode=abd_em_fr_2021.10.04_bX_logo_x__f1_s1_c1__header&amount=25&utm_campaign=abd_em_surv_2022.02.19_b1_2022-priorities_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&ms=ABD_EM_SURV_2022.02.19_b1_2022-priorities_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWE2NzdmZS1jODkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uhEBh_D28o7-rCp9EEVhXpHN2WxAfVqb4XCMbzeNCEY=)
---
Have you ever taken a survey and felt like no one was going to read it?

**Well this isn’t one of those surveys.**

Brad Pfaff is running a grassroots campaign. And that means we want to hear from our top supporters like you.

**That’s why I’m writing to you.[Take our short survey and share your priorities >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42001526/331236202/2064386342?refcode=ABD_EM_SURV_2022.02.19_b1_2022-priorities_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_campaign=abd_em_surv_2022.02.19_b1_2022-priorities_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&ms=ABD_EM_SURV_2022.02.19_b1_2022-priorities_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWE2NzdmZS1jODkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uhEBh_D28o7-rCp9EEVhXpHN2WxAfVqb4XCMbzeNCEY=&emci=386383ed-b891-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=eea677fe-c891-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=3200050)** | [TAKE THE SURVEY »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42001527/331236203/2064386342?refcode=ABD_EM_SURV_2022.02.19_b1_2022-priorities_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_campaign=abd_em_surv_2022.02.19_b1_2022-priorities_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&ms=ABD_EM_SURV_2022.02.19_b1_2022-priorities_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWE2NzdmZS1jODkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uhEBh_D28o7-rCp9EEVhXpHN2WxAfVqb4XCMbzeNCEY=&emci=386383ed-b891-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=eea677fe-c891-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=3200050)
---

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: Will you step up today for our democracy?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=m5pPjdLAQn7R4TELQlNbbGw4yn6Ubczg&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend, I want to extend my deepest gratitude to the hundreds of grassroots supporters who have stepped up to become Founding Election Year Donors.
While I am so thankful for the support I have received, there is a slight issue. **I am still 164 donors short of my goal, and my finance team tells me I must hit this target before midnight tonight, or there will be serious repercussions.**
It's February of the election year after all, Friend, and these fundraising goals matter more than ever. If we lose even one Senate seat in November, Republicans will regain Senate control for Mitch McConnell - and we just can't let that happen.
I can't afford to cut anything from my campaign budget, especially not now that the GOP is targeting this seat. National Republicans have millions of dollars at their disposal, which they will use to bolster my Trump-loyalist opponents who want to remove me from office for daring to hold the disgraced former president accountable.
If we fail to raise enough resources now, we could let Republicans take this seat and regain Senate control, stopping our Democratic agenda in its tracks.
**That 's why I had to reach out to you again, Friend. I know you're concerned about protecting our Senate control, so I hope you take this as seriously as I do: [Can I count on you to become a Founding Election Year Donor today by donating $5 or whatever you can spare? Even a few dollars will help me protect our Senate majority.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1143-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)**
Thank you so much,
Dick
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://action.richardblumenthal.com/p/salsa/supporter/unsubscribe/public/index.sjs?unsubscribe_page_KEY=550&Email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&email_blast_KEY=1408498&refcode=jtk1143-fr-nd)
Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

name: HMP
subject: BREAKING: pro-Trump forces plotted to INFILTRATE Democratic campaigns!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Majority PAC, http://www
body:
this is just a TASTE of what we can expect if Trump WINS in 2024!!!

|
---

| | [Folks, this is unbelievable!

According to _The New York Times_ , **_pro-Trump forces plotted to “infiltrate opponents of Donald Trump, including moderate Republicans as well as progressives and Democrats.”_**

name: Beto for Texas
subject: We don't want to have to ask Beto to take time away from critical campaign events
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
Every dollar you give will help ensure Beto can focus on the people of the Rio Grande Valley today and not spend a minute thinking about Abbott's mega-donors.
#
Yesterday, Beto kicked off a weekend of action in the Rio Grande Valley with stops in Edinburg, McAllen, and Harlingen.
While Beto heads to Brownsville and Donna to meet with Texans today, **our finance team will be focused on one thing: meeting our $750,000 fundraising goal before tonight's mandatory deadline.**
Everything we raise before midnight will become public after we file our report with the Texas Ethics Commission, so falling short isn't an option. [Will you chip in $3 or more right now?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53272?refcode=ema20220219-176960&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=176960%2E444211%2EwaXASN) **Let us explain why your contribution is so important.**
Lately, our fundraising has slowed down. If we don't pick up the pace, we risk being outraised by Abbott again. In a time of 30-second TV ads and super PACs, the only way forward is to run a people-powered effort like we've never seen before.
We had lofty goals for our fundraising this month, and to be candid, we might fall short if we don't step up the pace now. But worrying about fundraising is the last thing we want to put on Beto's plate right now as he meets with voters.
**We don't want to have to ask Beto to take time away from critical campaign events to help bridge this gap. So, we need to try our best to hit this $750,000 goal on our own.**
Please, we're relying on grassroots folks like you to help us hit this goal before midnight tonight, so we have to ask again:
[Can we count on you to be one of the people we need from PA to step up and help give Beto the resources to compete with Abbott? Every dollar you give will help ensure Beto can focus on the people of the Rio Grande Valley today and not spend a minute thinking about Abbott's mega-donors.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53272?refcode=ema20220219-176960&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=176960%2E444211%2EwaXASN)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53272?refcode=ema20220219-176960&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=176960%2E444211%2EwaXASN)**
Thank you.
— Team Beto

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220219-176960-footer&t=22&refcode2=176960_444211_waXASN&akid=176960%2E444211%2EwaXASN)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/bft-receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/sign/bft-personal-info/?t=23&akid=176960%2E444211%2EwaXASN)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=176960%2E444211%2EwaXASN)

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

Now, Ryan Zinke *claims* to live in that hotel in Whitefish, even though we know he spends most of his time down in Santa Barbara, California. _But voters in our Montana communities might not know this fact._

That’s why we are hyper-targeting our ad buys in newspapers in northwestern Montana — like _The Flathead Beacon_ — so the folks who Zinke claims to be his neighbors will know the truth. Ryan Zinke is NOT one of us — he’s just a corrupt, coastal elite politician who wants to go back to Washington to grow his fortune while life in Montana gets less and less stable.

**Between Zinke living in California and _The Washington Post_ confirming that he committed “dozens” of ethics violations while he served in the Trump Administration, we MUST do everything we can to expose Zinke’s lies.**

But there is something even worse than that to consider. **If we don’t defeat J.B. Pritzker, he will KEEP raising taxes and fees on the people of Illinois.** We can’t afford that. And it’s why it is so urgent that you stand up today and donate to our campaign. It's time to cut off Chicago's corrupt politicians at the source. No more dipping into our pockets for extra cash. ](http://links.team-sully.com/u/click?_t=76f7546524874789b286c588bf600eda&_m=a33bb68452fd4ebb92d9bb5f4db42a5d&_e=XwuyejacxVJSOTt3TMDfIbmpdcZ9cKnQE7ohiaIMdO1GLCHznKoC1IvrYruW_aclzpsiBvHDQ_cXgUr_Gzf6ukE7nrS97wdDnIr2dEXf1sDqbY-sN7JjqyaC0WxEv-xNW3U3co48k0uvQ2MBU_cL2QtnNt9kDMdGIudcFRhXQa5XN4Co7c5p1dLH3n732OK_2QleaFRTgXo4Pl0462YJ23eMBB6b-Q82yoH2W1gMrlA4W8Mv71U2mfy4ACF4GBrFtd1oLUOe7JOJiTL6TYkaBipWNiQsSNbtA-nijq0yM5cW1bEbi0FytYor9TsVITwyIF12WINB_uFNYjJFjeIyeHLityhAg4LcPxK-qJ3oLN5FtAkugVJ249-HQFqm-aQhRIt40syOHR9YaEgbQ-UQcPljuHG-TrWWSsZB6uCpHtYNV6kvFVFdBp02McAXoE6InIta_uE2AASTQ54QpHGCUIMHwOB4CaB5XSQRGVeSV9Il5Uopei-H2lTbqV4nPAN5)** But to do that, we need a new leader. name: Team Fetterman
subject: Help us get signs up in all 67 PA counties!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We have a simple goal.
#
Derek,
We have a simple goal: Get Team Fetterman yard signs up in yards + windows across all 67 Counties of Pennsylvania.
Don’t underestimate the power of the humble yard sign in big states like PA. They are a key way to let people know there’s a movement behind John. **That’s where you and our 67-County Mobilization Plan come in!**
**As a resident of Monroe County, we want YOU to have a yard sign, Derek. Will you pitch in $15 or more today to get a sign? We'll ship it right to you!** **⇢[Yes, I'll chip in $15 or more today to get a yard sign.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/44450?refcode=ema20220219-4644&first_name=Derek&t=1&akid=4644%2E434096%2EeMWmuX)** **⇢[No, I don't need a yard sign, but I’ll still chip in to help power John's campaign.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/44451?refcode=ema20220219-4644&first_name=Derek&t=2&akid=4644%2E434096%2EeMWmuX)** **[Get A Yard Sign →](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/44450?refcode=em20220219-4644&amount=5&t=3&akid=4644%2E434096%2EeMWmuX)**
---
We’re already seeing these yard signs all over the Commonwealth. With your help, we’re going to reach voters in all 67 Pennsylvania Counties — and move one step closer to flipping this Senate seat and saving our Democratic majority.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/44450?refcode=ema20220219-4644&first_name=Derek&t=9&akid=4644%2E434096%2EeMWmuX)
Thank you for being with us,
Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220219-4644-footer&t=11&refcode2=4644_434096_eMWmuX&akid=4644%2E434096%2EeMWmuX)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=12&akid=4644%2E434096%2EeMWmuX)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=4644%2E434096%2EeMWmuX)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: James Carville
subject: You can stop Mitch McConnell, folks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=2388%2E3611125%2EU5OMh0 ][IMG]

Alright folks, listen up.

Everything we as Democrats care about—the environment, affordable
healthcare, voting rights—will go down the toilet if we lose the Senate in
November.

The bottom line? The open Senate seat in Ohio could determine whether or
not we’re living in a post-democracy hellscape this time next year.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7985?t=1015&amount=25&akid=2388%2E3611125%2EU5OMh0 ]We cannot afford to leave things up to chance—I’m counting on you to
stand up and defend our Senate majority, because our democracy is on the
line, and that’s no joke. Can you chip in

subject: California gas prices hit a record high

body:
Every blue state is suffering
Peter

If you want to see what it looks like when the Left holds power for too long, look no farther than California. The historically blue state now boasts an average gas price per gallon of $4.70 compared to the national average of $3.49.

If this doesn’t tell you how badly Republicans need to take back control in Washington, we don’t know how else to communicate it to you. name: Self Reliance Central
subject: It’s ready to ship to you
body:
While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—
[View this message in your browser](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z5bpr293gfgo40u4qgvbf0ur9c01etkmot8icqj8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cpg69o74cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqct9hmcp7acdkmgprcd9m6kpr2sjk66pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65sb46do73dtim9q35c72ecqr2ob66eqr0oji6lhb8s746ppb1c5geiq7actmcooefkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3cup3aphgespm9ptnc5j35c5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
| | This sponsored message from The Hollywood Conservative is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zn0nstu1q3oglcpv95fp06a93luj28di7jf9gbj8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cpg69o74cjh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend, While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons.

King David’s momentous story provides profound insights into many of life’s most important questions, including: What are my responsibilities to God? What do I owe my fellow man? How do I lead my family? How do I turn away from sin? What is the best way to lead others?

Taught by Hillsdale College Professor of English Justin Jackson, **“The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King”** examines the Old Testament books of First and Second Samuel. This eight-lesson course explores David’s character and the consequences of his choices on his family and the people of Israel.
---
| | **This is why we’ve produced our online course, “The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King,” which is now available on DVD. And you can reserve your copy using this secure link:**

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2za7ujvci339t5hovsdjv5fe0bbaji4j3fqvc6v68_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cpg69o74cjh2bs)** By viewing the course, you’ll learn more about the nature of God, family, leadership, sin, and repentance; in short, you’ll learn more about what truly matters in life. **I hope you’ll reserve your DVD today and share its abiding lessons with your family and friends. The DVD is perfect for a Bible study or homeschool curriculum.**
---
| [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zfgkt2ua3jqbam9nfs8filgg6eurt92n3m6bc3n8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cpg69o74cjh2bs)
---
| | Let’s learn what truly matters in life by studying **“The David Story.”**

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

**P.S.** If you’d like to secure a DVD box set of **“The David Story”** while they’re available, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more in support of reaching and teaching millions on behalf of liberty.

Reserve your DVD box set using the secure link below:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zhkc88dak1ihj5rdqr54f9fedp9he4deo5kpajn0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cpg69o74cjh2bs)**
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Self Reliance Central, [please use this preferences page](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/prefs/9z2zm1ki2cd62teaq6d3mmo2k80jcptflib4bg9cbig).
1602 Belle View Blvd #381, Alexandria, VA 22307

[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zo4hp1sievkbgn584ol6oeos15ugb6t2qm9s1ot8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cpg69o74cjh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: "Squad politics backfire"
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Corporate Democrats are always blaming progressives for their own
failures. When Democrats lose, they blame progressives in their quest for
power with no questions asked. They did it when the House majority shrunk
after the 2020 election and when centrists lost the Virginia governor’s
race last year. And they’re doing it again as Democrats see their polling
numbers slip ahead of the midterm elections in November.

Right now, headlines are abounding that show the Party blaming “Squad
politics” for the grim midterm election prospects. Like this one that
dropped yesterday:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/94695?refcode=em20220219-22052&t=1002&akid=22052%2E1203867%2El3c0YP ]Headline from Axios reads Squad politics backfire

Two things: 1) the majority party almost always loses their majority in
the midterms and 2) the only way to prevent this is for voters to feel in
their bones that President Biden and Democrats have delivered for them.
But because of obstruction from a handful of corporate-backed,
conservative Democrats that has not happened. This is the problem.

The Squad’s politics are doing what’s right for the people. That’s why
AOC, Ilhan, Rashida, Cori, Jamaal, and Ayanna were the only House
Democrats to vote to protect President Biden’s agenda to fight climate
change, extend the Child Tax Credit, lower health care costs, and secure
paid family and medical leave. Now, because of the Democratic Party’s
inability to deliver, child poverty rose 41% after the Child Tax Credit
wasn’t renewed.

We will never back down from Squad politics, because Squad politics is
fighting to reduce child poverty, it’s Medicare for All, it’s a Green New
Deal, it’s codifying Roe v. Wade, it’s canceling student debt, it’s racial
justice, it’s raising the minimum wage to at least $15, and more.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/94695?refcode=em20220219-22052&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=22052%2E1203867%2El3c0YP ]We need to show that we won’t back off our calls for economic, social,
racial, and environmental justice. Can you rush a $3
donation to Justice Democrats to show our power? This is part of our
response to smears from the Democratic establishment.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/94695?refcode=em20220219-22052&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=22052%2E1203867%2El3c0YP ]Contribute

Buried in a recent Politico article that blames the “culture war” for
Democrats’ grim election polling is this critical nugget: “Voters think
Democrats ‘are not making good use of their majority.’”

That’s what it really comes down to,
Peter. If Democrats renewed the
Child Tax Credit and passed Build Back Better, they’d be concretely
delivering economic relief to tens of millions of people. If corporate
Democrats listened less to their corporate donors, and fought for the
people, they’d be creating jobs, protecting the planet, and improving life
for nearly every person in this country.

That’s what Democrats could be delivering if they followed Squad politics.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/94695?refcode=em20220219-22052&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=22052%2E1203867%2El3c0YP ]Can you chip in $3 to help us expand the Squad in
Congress and advocate for even more Squad politics? We must show the
strength of progressives right now, as the onslaught of smears from
corporate Democrats continues.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/94695?refcode=em20220219-22052&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1024&akid=22052%2E1203867%2El3c0YP ]Contribute

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1025&akid=22052%2E1203867%2El3c0YP ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1026&akid=22052%2E1203867%2El3c0YP ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220219-22052-footer&t=1027&refcode2=22052_1203867_l3c0YP&akid=22052%2E1203867%2El3c0YP

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1028&akid=22052%2E1203867%2El3c0YP

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Greg Casar
subject: This is who inspires me most
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg Casar for Congress
body:
Peter.
During my time on the Austin City Council, I’ve had the chance to work with some incredible people fighting for change. But some of my proudest work has come from working with sexual assault survivors and advocates, including Marina, who is featured in our latest ad. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress-ad-marina?refcode=02.19_email]
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MNzNgib3ysA [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MNzNgib3ysA]
I’m so grateful to Marina for sharing her story. Her story helped expose the systemic barriers that sexual assault survivors face in seeking justice in our City, including the Austin Police Department’s decades-long backlog of rape kits.
>> CHIP IN TO HELP US KEEP THIS AD RUNNING << [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress-ad-marina?refcode=02.19_email]
Thanks to Marina’s bravery and the advocacy of so many others who came forward, we were able to clear the backlog. She and other survivors refused to be ignored, and even sued the local government until we expanded victim services and gave survivors a seat at the table in our City.
Hers are the kinds of stories that continue to inspire me—everyday people standing up and speaking out to demand change. When I’m elected, I’ll fight every day to ensure people like Marina have a voice in Congress. But I can’t do it without your support.
Election Day is only TEN days away—can you chip in right now to help us keep this ad running and Get Out The Vote in this final stretch? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress-ad-marina?refcode=02.19_email]
Thank you,
-Greg
http://facebook.com/gregcasar [http://facebook.com/gregcasar] http://twitter.com/gregcasar [http://twitter.com/gregcasar] http://instagram.com/gregcasar [http://instagram.com/gregcasar]
Paid for by Greg Casar for Congress
Greg Casar for Congress
P.O. Box 301923
Austin, TX 78703
United States

body:
Put pressure on Sinema to stop catering to Big Pharma. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ylv71NjtRp9uAvapwZeG5Fwod7vf2Q19deFkSzINQB7pYO7Ed0TOwyvjuedJ39zpEnMq3REs_6qpHFEbObeQSefEuosMlyzL6pkt-qavlTwCbhRYCUh4jR3RwWbN-4xlldb74JXSz9JgvQWRy5yyE5XkI5L-QsFbBh2KvCZ7OIGapUzYu5X8NhkNyXxt1qXIjcATziQ4J7975ntd-3cua1Q_czhXvL2_Ch6_wdVDJpKh-Yj9pXv96cSiltiD4ZJS8q7eafC1WcvfD7IJ027cO8uHPZXT6ZGMqwZF4YCSaVJzj4j-RP6lBVaFNq6kKmFdh12SAmwNM1RfNDCiHvoOgPeX9fxynPGgJb43lMSuNaLZNDRy8ZDiBXLWhDDyh6rhKXvjI7jvc76U4rNbzz1zTz/3jp/gymjjZ0oR4e-iRyf5tN2WA/h0/XjYYsjlli-qSlZvaMHqPKXGEOgqxfWlcvh0GHGQh2kM)
Peter, Good news: President Joe Biden has joined dozens of vulnerable House Democrats and called for action to lower “absurd” drug prices and hold Big Pharma accountable. But if there’s any chance of Congress passing drug pricing reforms before the midterms, **we know we need to put pressure on Senator Kyrsten Sinema.** Peter, we can’t allow her to obstruct this again. That means we need to do everything we can to hold her accountable to do the right thing. **[Tell Kyrsten Sinema: Listen to us, not special interests. Commit to voting Yes on drug pricing reforms.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmw35G2snBkLVgBX_kTVLNjpb0VmVNS5B3Um79yThrRvV1r7SsZCj4kceAOOTX_A1CaryPYgXlycActB6cSb6VsKGbouEyImDAJrWf3mD0Kkw2aFTQtX2hQBrr-A9xtBjEs9DZMOhmDLHXZz1RvcryncGpNlo3ybFyoF7CsCfqCdTTdpowE0vsI8de17ngJRzX2kOSK4EYpvkH0whY-FCAVhNcZgGLgbr_G-Og6Y7W6ikWQ8Hmb-GoBimpcU5xWKNSXVrBAKFU13L5X6ZldM_G6VpjZ-GR8FIg24KX1gAARhmC3X1-f-JaM0gVcKAdwyOIEYk9tPOWRTm3_lbtwMYJasnVx8P-YZdKUtC_9a-4elTXw5plRwsvf8xFiEfIgMk-30XeEPflxZHMdQ7uum-Q9GSz67b9BPhvr3MPKCKyEGEFGOc7MbAqFQxU0A1hOTIVvdmXjHfuySWo55FGmByYbEpguKOAs63qoZlG61AZTzw/3jp/gymjjZ0oR4e-iRyf5tN2WA/h1/WyCW9iA1FCvjFne7J1VV9RfKn3uOlIBUGDKVrGqlK6M)** **[Sign Now](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmw35G2snBkLVgBX_kTVLNjpb0VmVNS5B3Um79yThrRvV1r7SsZCj4kceAOOTX_A1CaryPYgXlycActB6cSb6VsKGbouEyImDAJrWf3mD0Kkw2aFTQtX2hQBrr-A9xtBjEs9DZMOhmDLHXZz1Rvcryn7sUQo4W1ayTRuEwuUNcpjU8TqZkkbMxkd7IYMz4Gpv7EyOtHEQpAL6xNPDtYsY0uftnmwcykShnqEpkWA02UJbyhBI85_1t4qBd9o3jXfzoxgUwYLd3noIO0fYzPAD_7E-lcZzDOzOisw4jGJHfru6SDEVhGltg-g4Rp3RSEB6V3ZhtGJlBIvE91Gn_66RJLtdFufOl_1Fl2hPXeLjX5-bGfdL8t8hvjY3LK43DFctHyrzo5fOJTEbuEExRtnRHakElU4vEKgcDFIw26X3vnItsZ7E1VhlXuCFv43-7Ea_LOBKbMujDFTZGmGTwIGFt8AFLyUwrGjhBcc-j5nAFzIA/3jp/gymjjZ0oR4e-iRyf5tN2WA/h2/jBxZyoBGCAEtZ7jbXSf4SYsmq525S4fdTapX86UMvQk)** To say that Kyrsten Sinema is deep in the pocket of Big Pharma is an understatement. Reports showed that Center Forward — a dark money group funded by powerful drug lobby Pharmaceutical Research and Manufacturers of America (PhRMA) — spent $1.2 _million_ since September 2021 to build up support for Senator Sinema. In turn, she helped gut the Democrats' drug pricing plan from the Build Back Better Act, blatantly refusing to keep her campaign promise to millions of Arizonans to lower drug prices. And now, with this legislation coming back around — **who knows what Big Pharma will pull to make sure that Kyrsten Sinema obstructs her Democratic colleagues’ agenda?** We can’t stand on the sidelines to wait to find out, Peter. This is a chance to enact key policies like steep taxes on companies that gouge drug prices, and caps on out-of-pocket drug costs and insulin co-pays for Medicare beneficiaries. We need to make sure Kyrsten Sinema doesn’t betray us again to protect Big Pharma’s bottom line. **[Please sign on to our petition today. clean_body: Put pressure on Sinema to stop catering to Big Pharma. | | | Peter, Good news: President Joe Biden has joined dozens of vulnerable House Democrats and called for action to lower “absurd” drug prices and hold Big Pharma accountable. But if there’s any chance of Congress passing drug pricing reforms before the midterms, we know we need to put pressure on Senator Kyrsten Sinema. Peter, we can’t allow her to obstruct this again. That means we need to do everything we can to hold her accountable to do the right thing. To say that Kyrsten Sinema is deep in the pocket of Big Pharma is an understatement. Reports showed that Center Forward — a dark money group funded by powerful drug lobby Pharmaceutical Research and Manufacturers of America (PhRMA) — spent $1.2 million since September 2021 to build up support for Senator Sinema. In turn, she helped gut the Democrats' drug pricing plan from the Build Back Better Act, blatantly refusing to keep her campaign promise to millions of Arizonans to lower drug prices. And now, with this legislation coming back around — who knows what Big Pharma will pull to make sure that Kyrsten Sinema obstructs her Democratic colleagues’ agenda? We can’t stand on the sidelines to wait to find out, Peter. This is a chance to enact key policies like steep taxes on companies that gouge drug prices, and caps on out-of-pocket drug costs and insulin co-pays for Medicare beneficiaries. We need to make sure Kyrsten Sinema doesn’t betray us again to protect Big Pharma’s bottom line. Thank you for taking the time to share your response. It really means a lot, and we can’t wait to share what we learn from you and your fellow supporters. Thank you for taking action, Primary Sinema Project | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. clean_body: The Left won’t know what hit them. | Friend, Polls continue to show that a majority of Wisconsin voters will NOT vote to reelect radical liberal Tony Evers, and it’s clear why... At every turn, Evers has taken the side of rioters, special interests, liberal unions, or the “woke” mob over the people of Wisconsin. But when we win this governor’s race, that all changes on DAY ONE. As your next governor, you have my word, I will have the most aggressive first 100 days in office in our state’s history to undo the damage Evers has caused. I will: Ban ballot harvesting, eliminate ballot boxes, and abolish the WEC Put 1,000 more cops on the street, institute mandatory bail minimums, and FIRE liberal DA John Chisholm Ban vaccine mandates and fight for YOUR freedoms Unmask our kids and allow parents to decide what’s best for their own children Break up the FAILED Milwaukee Public Schools system ... just to name a few. But to take back our great state and put my plan into action, I need YOU fighting by my side. During my time as Lt. Governor to Governor Scott Walker, we advanced the most conservative agenda in Wisconsin history. The first 100 days of the Walker-Kleefisch administration drove Democrats and the liberal media insane. Just wait until these next 100 days – they won’t know what hit them. But without your support, our mission to make Wisconsin once again work for YOU is in jeopardy. _With the country in need of COVID-19 relief and vaccinations,_ Democrats delivered the American Rescue Plan.

_With our infrastructure lagging behind the rest of the world,_ Democrats helped pass a historic investment to upgrade our roads and bridges.

_And with our Post Office suffering under Trump 's crony Louis DeJoy,_ the House secured a MASSIVE overhaul to defend this vital service for years to come.

It's never been clearer: **Democrats DELIVER for the American people.**

But if we lose our House Majority, we won't be able to keep making progress on even more pressing issues.

So at this pivotal moment, we need grassroots supporters everywhere to help us develop a winning strategy to elect even more Democrats and defend our Majority.

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46425537&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE4MjIwNjA4NgS2&l=14434230&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority \-- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46425537&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE4MjIwNjA4NgS2&l=14434230&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.
clean_body: Can you spare just 30 seconds of your Saturday morning and submit your response straight away? | | | We just launched our February Priorities Survey. Your immediate feedback is critical to developing a winning strategy to hold the House and elect even more Democrats. NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com Survey Response: | It's clear that when the American people speak, Democrats listen. With the country in need of COVID-19 relief and vaccinations, Democrats delivered the American Rescue Plan. With our infrastructure lagging behind the rest of the world, Democrats helped pass a historic investment to upgrade our roads and bridges. And with our Post Office suffering under Trump 's crony Louis DeJoy, the House secured a MASSIVE overhaul to defend this vital service for years to come. It's never been clearer: Democrats DELIVER for the American people. But if we lose our House Majority, we won't be able to keep making progress on even more pressing issues. So at this pivotal moment, we need grassroots supporters everywhere to help us develop a winning strategy to elect even more Democrats and defend our Majority. And right now, that starts with completing our February Priorities Survey before our deadline at midnight tomorrow. | | ---|---|--- Thanks, DCCC Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Truckers for Freedom
subject: The USA Freedom Convoy is coming
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Great American Patriot Project
body:
---
| | |
Peter

I'm writing to you with very exciting news. Just like our neighbors to the North in Canada, America's truckers are fed up with the unscientific and unconstitutional government overreach we've endured over the past two years, _and we 're taking action._

**That 's right, a Freedom Convoy driving from California to Washington, D.C. is beginning on March 2nd!**
**_[SUPPORT THE CONVOY](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59606733:6OggVXEFN:m:1:3253819041:8731085EF0B32946092972E7BCC941FB:r)_**
We've had enough. Vaccine mandates, mask mandates, lockdowns, and restrictions have all failed to stop the spread of the virus. **As we all know, it stopped being about the virus a long time ago, it's just about control and power.**

When Justin Trudeau announced he was using terrorism laws to freeze the bank accounts of peaceful protestors in Ottawa without due process, **_HE DIDN 'T MENTION COVID ONCE!!!_**

These same tyrannical, thuggish tactics will come to America if we don't stand up and say ENOUGH IS ENOUGH, [**_which is why we 're asking you to join us by making a secure donation on our independent fundraising platform._**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59606733:6OggVXEFN:m:1:3253819041:8731085EF0B32946092972E7BCC941FB:r)

Your money will go directly to paying for fuel and food for the brave Truckers in the Freedom Convoy. With gas prices skyrocketing under Joe Biden, fuel for the cross country trip is $5,000 per Big Rig! [**_$15 = 10 Miles_**

**_$30 = 20 Miles_**

**_$150 = 100 Miles_**

**_$375 = 250 Miles_**

**_$750 = 500 Miles_**

**_$1,500 = 1,000 Miles_**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59606733:6OggVXEFN:m:1:3253819041:8731085EF0B32946092972E7BCC941FB:r)
We the Truckers, and We the People, have had enough of the creeping tyranny, and we're putting our lives on hold and our livelihoods on the line to get our Freedom back.

[**_So, I hope you 'll join us as we embark upon this great journey with a generous gift of any amount._**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59606733:6OggVXEFN:m:1:3253819041:8731085EF0B32946092972E7BCC941FB:r)

In Liberty,

Truckers for Freedom

| Paid for by Great American Patriot Project

---

| Peter,
---
I recently asked grassroots Americans to give $5 (the same amount my parents began their American journey with) to support my fight against socialism, and I was blown away by the response.

Contributions flooded in from across America, and we’ve raised thousands of dollars to fund our fight against the socialist Left.

But unfortunately, we’re still 207 contributions short of the ambitious target set by my team, so I’m following up with the biggest patriots I know to see if you’d be willing to step up.

_For just $5, you can help defend free markets, individual liberty, and our constitutional rights from the extremist left-wing Democrats in Congress._

Fwd: National Democrats are targeting our Indiana. Help us fight back! Read more >> | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indgop/national-democrats-have-indiana-in-their-sights-471202?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | Hoosier Republican,

I hope you saw Chairman Kyle Hupfer’s email about how National Democrats are planning to target our great state in the upcoming election and our need to fight back.

They’re looking to unleash their political machine on Hoosiers and bring Joe Biden, Chuck Schumer, and Nancy Pelosi’s far-left agenda to Indiana.

We can’t let that happen.

Please sign up to become a sustaining donor and help us fight back!
---
| [BECOME A SUSTAINING MEMBER >>](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c30645bb21&e=1acd9bb3d6 "BECOME A SUSTAINING MEMBER >>")

| Hoosier Republican, it’s going to take every Republican in Indiana standing strong, together, for us to succeed.

Can we count on you?

—Luke Thomas, Digital Director

|
---
| Hoosier Republican,

The floundering of Joe Biden, Chuck Schumer, and Nancy Pelosi’s far-left agenda isn’t stopping National Democrats from trying to pick up more seats in the U.S. House.

In fact, they have one of our districts in their sights.

We’ve seen what Democrats in the U.S. House are capable of delivering for Hoosiers—record inflation, higher crime, and lower wages—and we’ve seen how it impacts us.

We can’t let this madness continue!

Hoosier Republican, help us fight back and keep National Democrats out of Indiana. For as little as $5 a month, you can play an integral part in making sure Joe Biden, Chuck Schumer, and Nancy Pelosi’s far-left agenda never crosses the mighty Ohio and never reaches the Wabash.

name: Team Jayapal
subject: Pramila in Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Pramila runs a year-round organizing program.
#
Peter,
Regardless of the election cycle, our team is always working to organize communities, register voters, and build progressive power. Last year, we made over 100,000 calls to voters, and we are gearing up to help elect Democrats like Greg Casar in the upcoming Texas primaries.
In-person early voting has already begun in Texas — and Pramila is in Texas _right now_ getting out the vote for Greg. The 2022 election cycle is officially underway.
[**It takes immense resources to run such a robust organizing program like this, and every contribution ensures that our team can continue this vital work. Can you contribute $3 to fuel Pramila’s year-round organizing work?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/10836?refcode=em20220219-1044&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=1044%2E420207%2EzQL2sJ)
**[Chip in $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/10836?refcode=em20220219-1044&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=1044%2E420207%2EzQL2sJ)**
Pramila is proud to run a year-round organizing program. Many elected officials wait until September of an election year to begin their organizing efforts. Team Pramila believes in doing things a little differently — we organize all year, every year because we know power cannot be built in a span of a few weeks.
Pramila started out as an organizer, fighting locally (and successfully) to raise the minimum wage in Seattle to $15. She hasn’t stopped being an organizer and she won’t stop knocking doors and building power for the people.
[**Peter, can you contribute $3 today to help Pramila defend the Democratic majority in Congress and organize to elect progressives? There’s a lot of work to do to expand our Progressive Caucus and ensure the GOP does not take power.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/10836?refcode=em20220219-1044&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=1044%2E420207%2EzQL2sJ)
We’ll be sure to update you on Pramila’s trip to Texas and her organizing work across the country as this election year continues.
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220219-1044-footer&t=22&refcode2=1044_420207_zQL2sJ&akid=1044%2E420207%2EzQL2sJ)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=23&akid=1044%2E420207%2EzQL2sJ)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=1044%2E420207%2EzQL2sJ)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: Jacky
subject: Fwd: I noticed your input is missing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
| |
---
Friend, I wanted to make sure you saw this.

**You were _specifically_ chosen to help us shape a winning strategy for the months ahead in our Democratic Focus Group. B****ut with time running out before our midnight deadline, we're still missing 43 responses.**
Political experts are predicting that Mitch McConnell will regain control of the Senate, and GOP megadonors are already pouring millions into battleground races across the country. If we're going to defend our 50-50 Senate majority, we need top Democrats like you to weigh in immediately – so I'm counting on your response.
**The focus group will close at 11:59 p.m. tonight, so please don't wait to share your input.

Here's the link: [http://surveys.jackyrosen.com/rosen-digital-focus-group](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42003554/331248034/-1072294119?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1633-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzk0NjFiZi1lMDkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d8w87XEa8F80lxHiJCdXl_E-X_OjPWPMjY2WkSiCpp4=&emci=66557725-e390-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=f39461bf-e091-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=3800590)**
Thank you,

Jacky Rosen
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Blue Senate**
Date: Fri, Feb 18, 2022
Subject: Democratic Focus Group: Personal Invite for you
| | |
---
**Here's the situation, friend:** Experts everywhere from Nate Silver's _FiveThirtyEight_ to CNN are reporting that the GOP is favored to deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell – and they only need to flip ONE seat red to do it.
That means we can't afford to make a single mistake if we're going to prevent a McConnell-led Senate from obstructing President Biden's agenda at every turn, but the GOP is spending MILLIONS to crush Democrats across the country – and polling shows must-win battleground races locked neck-and-neck.
**This is urgent, friend. The only way we can build a strategy strong enough to defend our razor-thin majority is with the insights of top Democrats. That's why we pulled together a list of the most dedicated members of this team, and your name is on it, friend.**
**[Will you join our invite-only Democratic Focus Group to share your critical grassroots insights on our strategy to fight back against the GOP's megadonors and defend our narrow Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42003555/331248035/-1072294119?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1633-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzk0NjFiZi1lMDkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d8w87XEa8F80lxHiJCdXl_E-X_OjPWPMjY2WkSiCpp4=&emci=66557725-e390-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=f39461bf-e091-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=3800590)**
| | [BEGIN THE FOCUS GROUP](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42003556/331248036/-1072294119?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1633-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzk0NjFiZi1lMDkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d8w87XEa8F80lxHiJCdXl_E-X_OjPWPMjY2WkSiCpp4=&emci=66557725-e390-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=f39461bf-e091-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=3800590)
---
The stakes of this fight couldn't be higher. As Republicans do everything they can to roll back our most fundamental rights, everything from reproductive freedom to voting rights to health care is on the line in November.
**That's why we need our top supporters to weigh in on the best strategy to win key battleground races and keep McConnell out of power – but we still don't have your responses, friend. Please, we're counting on you to join our invite-only focus group before it expires at midnight tonight.**
**Here's the link we generated _specifically_ for you: [surveys.signforgood.com/rosen-digital-focus-group](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42003557/331248037/-1072294119?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1633-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzk0NjFiZi1lMDkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d8w87XEa8F80lxHiJCdXl_E-X_OjPWPMjY2WkSiCpp4=&emci=66557725-e390-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=f39461bf-e091-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=3800590)**
Thank you for taking the time to share your input. It really is invaluable.

Team Rosen
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/66557725-e390-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a/f39461bf-e091-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzk0NjFiZi1lMDkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d8w87XEa8F80lxHiJCdXl_E-X_OjPWPMjY2WkSiCpp4=&id=105090150) Contributions to Rosen for Nevada are not tax deductible. | | Paid for by Rosen for Nevada

name: Herschel Walker
subject: This is good news. But we can’t take anything for granted
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
Our campaign is taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum behind our campaign building, but we need your help. Our campaign is taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum behind our campaign building, but we need your help. |
---
Fellow American,

We wanted to share some good news with you. Please see the headline below:

[](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=2b239def26d740028dcd5d2b8db1f08f&_e=TY_pCjTHtx017js2_tfM0PAnQxuen-4b4ICeAmn4PKHG8Gy03mVfsWqX5Mg0WcdIkAO0FloYLW1zbfv_lvvqbVKeg-ieOrs9exg4bSVuf9TUQ8J-DVYHI5lZazLf0RX-Lx8kLDzanFBu2YqFqNWsGlNbj-Gt87C19bs_LQqR2zN_v5LVc2R3FumKEU27Y6Z8qoDUhipLD65YweEsSkT9QqleC4481zYtBFBmxg99FBX_pDjG-lkJyWFZItOfLytHEzr78Hnck7PK0GM7d6OcBC6TIXLN0iDu7djkzfdUNt4LoqJe1u83b5NctwvqRW0gyCNQUL_lIUhTKGYHDnYMPp4R88AEFtiBnXewEaiYnFZLYNLInA0Pg30rgEylB4hFgZOV5PP30-j95mscMG2QKXfqoZv45tqHPKuB_ZI-9S4et6dKphPHFuQe6ivABybsWW0PeeIGFqdTavCPAD5PUQ%3D%3D)
That's right - NBC News reported that a recent poll has our campaign pulling ONE POINT ahead of the Democrat incumbent in Georgia - 49% to 48%!

While this is fantastic news, there are some important points to consider:
1. This poll shows the strength of the campaign we're building, but we're still more than eight months away from Election Day. A lot can - and will - happen between now and November 8.
2. In some states, you can win an election with a plurality like 49%. But in Georgia, we must get a majority of the votes to win, so we still have hard work to do to get over 50%.
3. We are taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum building for our campaign, but we know it will take an incredible amount of sweat equity to win this race.

**[Today we're asking you to consider a gift of $3 or more to our campaign to strike while the iron is hot and flip this Senate seat RED.](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=2b239def26d740028dcd5d2b8db1f08f&_e=TY_pCjTHtx017js2_tfM0PAnQxuen-4b4ICeAmn4PKHG8Gy03mVfsWqX5Mg0WcdIkAO0FloYLW1zbfv_lvvqbVKeg-ieOrs9exg4bSVuf9TUQ8J-DVYHI5lZazLf0RX-Lx8kLDzanFBu2YqFqNWsGlNbj-Gt87C19bs_LQqR2zN_v5LVc2R3FumKEU27Y6Z8qoDUhipLD65YweEsSkT9QqleC4481zYtBFBmxg99FBX_pDjG-lkJyWFZItOfLytHTVHEylBdUhk2EiZenTt2Ze8-4QBmJVOO7WvSQuhu25Nxe_cXhyDdrE11NFwpd0i3KmAe3uQyx-Y6VJ-UkMjr9GfhcAvn-eogl7M9OfSaVxzeDZ95XSQT93rlo6-4Lu1XLeUl1D_yFIs-nDYru1E_mbs4QIzZffhbMfY8yCkaxychap7O5HM44IGMcc31D11n7u-5dbNx3_cWYiv-Q3x1Rw%3D%3D)**

clean_body: Our campaign is taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum behind our campaign building, but we need your help. Our campaign is taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum behind our campaign building, but we need your help. | Fellow American, We wanted to share some good news with you. Please see the headline below: That's right - NBC News reported that a recent poll has our campaign pulling ONE POINT ahead of the Democrat incumbent in Georgia - 49% to 48%! While this is fantastic news, there are some important points to consider: 1. This poll shows the strength of the campaign we're building, but we're still more than eight months away from Election Day. A lot can - and will - happen between now and November 8. 2. In some states, you can win an election with a plurality like 49%. But in Georgia, we must get a majority of the votes to win, so we still have hard work to do to get over 50%. 3. We are taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum building for our campaign, but we know it will take an incredible amount of sweat equity to win this race. We need 500 donations before midnight tonight to keep pace with this week's goal. If polls are this tight eight months out from Election Day, then we fully expect this race is going to be a grueling fight to the finish. Even NBC News, which is not known for their fair and balanced reporting, acknowledges that this is going to be one of the MOST COMPETITIVE RACES IN THE NATION. We've already seen the Democrats use this poll to motivate their supporters and raise more money, so there is no time to waste. Please donate $3 or more to our campaign right now. Thank you for your support, Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

body:
The next few months are shaping up to be extremely contentious — and consequential — for our country, and for our democracy.
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42000017/331225479/396464211?refcode=em-logo&refcode2=ce5ef565-b891-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&contactdata=zKhi4O36Ly8NEee8fCDlNq4k4LO0KBpqjfhpyWNKsZ3hMfjfd2NsLZgJuzAtqUgG&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTVlZjU2NS1iODkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cQh3aNjC5tKilpLjskkY7fQyv7xZs8GvFF3XyAXNB3o=)
Friends -
The next few months are shaping up to be extremely contentious — and consequential — for our country, and for our democracy.
Unless something unforeseen happens, we’ll be voting on a new justice to serve on the United States Supreme Court. Meanwhile, we must continue the fight to lower costs for American families, give Medicare the power to negotiate lower drug prices, and move ahead with the creation of millions of clean energy jobs – and pay for this by closing tax loopholes for the super rich and giant corporations. We must also take steps to strengthen and protect our democracy, while limiting the role dark money plays in future contests.
Oh, and control of the Senate and House of Representatives are on the line in November.
In other words, we have a lot of work to do, all of it important, and time is running out.
I know where I stand — I will never give up on any of these issues. But today I want to hear from you:
[**Can you please take 2 minutes to complete a short survey to let me know the issues that are most important to you? clean_body: The next few months are shaping up to be extremely contentious — and consequential — for our country, and for our democracy. = Friends - The next few months are shaping up to be extremely contentious — and consequential — for our country, and for our democracy. Unless something unforeseen happens, we’ll be voting on a new justice to serve on the United States Supreme Court. Meanwhile, we must continue the fight to lower costs for American families, give Medicare the power to negotiate lower drug prices, and move ahead with the creation of millions of clean energy jobs – and pay for this by closing tax loopholes for the super rich and giant corporations. We must also take steps to strengthen and protect our democracy, while limiting the role dark money plays in future contests. Oh, and control of the Senate and House of Representatives are on the line in November. In other words, we have a lot of work to do, all of it important, and time is running out. I know where I stand — I will never give up on any of these issues. But today I want to hear from you: In the months ahead, our test is to continue fighting for action that improves the lives of the American people, even in the face of strong resistance from those who want to obstruct all progress and drag our country backwards. Tell me how you feel. Onwards, Chris PAID FOR BY VAN HOLLEN FOR SENATE If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, you can , but we'd be very sorry to see you go.

body:
| | | This is about setting the record straight. | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wrxiVjJVo8kNicQiFnsBVpxZC06SqQUeKer8Awrmww9lI4JQZn8aEF3JIhlVntjOEK95HMEqkGPsUSGLmpY5lDTp8JzEUg696ikV3HFRQfVoLffEm_7KykVCSpn1_P2pxb53Qp31_FXYqxqK64G-yFcf-sqDRwxkYTCXxLgCdj_hsrxjet-QkdoPCrD1V1BI5Sg52JPNzVBnLkp_0YXp9Kef1uHdGkRK-4cyPsxuFeSNQpElBbS4CQt08pkR1hRkUVmX-ZBu0VmdES2FGQOAeg2gaYN6SB94oxDdkH_ASErQ2PggFY37UmikN-9QImPcMTrm1vKXiF6nBsoxc0tiC_V0VeOB9zQXm6mIowGT7-HRREKfcV_pW08JHrmt77QU_fjfqz5WEsis-iVB_r5RscX7MgmyMBLA1Jtbl7frcEuQ/3jp/fYB54NW-TWmTEQ_5lGjcLg/h0/czksYJKBQHPGWhfypbn6MsAn6S3L_GHI3pMgoXhyfqs)

---
| Team, my name is Ruben Gallego, and I represent Arizona in Congress.

Before that, I was a Marine who served in Iraq. So I know the difference between “legitimate political discourse” and what an insurrection looks like. I was also on the floor of the U.S. House, listening to Paul Gosar lie to the American people when Trump insurrectionists tried to break in.

So when the Republican National Committee recently voted to claim that the **January 6** commission was a witch hunt for people participating in “legitimate political discourse,” I knew I couldn’t stay quiet.

I’m not going to let my state or my country be taken over by insurrectionists determined to damage our democracy. So I’m personally reaching out to you to split a donation between my campaign and the Arizona Democratic Party so we can work together to defeat every single insurrectionist here in Arizona.

**[Team, I’m personally reaching out to you to split a donation between my campaign and the Arizona Democratic Party. Can you make a $5 donation today so we can work together to defeat every single insurrectionist here in Arizona?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wrxiVjJVo8kNicQiFnsBVpxZC06SqQUeKer8Awrmww9lI4JQZn8aEF3JIhlVntjOEK95HMEqkGPsUSGLmpY5lDTp8JzEUg696ikV3HFRQfVuwbasXpSI0j-uahpoOQ5N18zEerWK0UUWWd9svAlGV3j7BGoIHXfm3_iwYph9o8yGQM2QRg5x9TTU9sVe7w-fRHjm5eIU7EydkcatZEn6zC3mp6usP-HkEAvMdAtfxFqhUSU_yx0KMUggiWn8YFb4YWPhkPRYHWk5Z2voT4-pGm-Jc8ABcNtYITMUMd6_OPXWqZR1xnB7OOSN_Ev_9S6wAbCAzih0XA5gF7f0EFP3BbBCzkQRrZA5amEmwoGBLNweZkXGHhKQm3EFhomRdbF5NrhQeGq5lzdmvGBBwiW6700cLp5FHtmA92OwGZRL0UEQ/3jp/fYB54NW-TWmTEQ_5lGjcLg/h1/ajNAR98vxpa1hxOyj8RDU5Jj5QOeJkht6CfLq4uiy_Q)** [
DONATE ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wrxiVjJVo8kNicQiFnsBVpxZC06SqQUeKer8Awrmww9lI4JQZn8aEF3JIhlVntjOEK95HMEqkGPsUSGLmpY5lDTp8JzEUg696ikV3HFRQfVuUlqY14ryh9lcqpFWT3MMaoQBAgSxFScIlZTeHcYLP4S6Cxm7EiEOWSTF94j68nejg0-UNu3A1AMD_EUXXPHVwCGXpXxIOfgV9AYpvZGgX44qEjx38ApuHXDOhxjcpVDEVAh7BP_MXNUFbRmbDHwml53DULI0p_ddpx9P6Gr5jv-Fd6qARmoaLNz8fKJAyWq0kx6p3DdYlmHCqpFuf7AZuz8XayQd85zNyb-rDS_levb6DL0IG5oQc3QSTx1D2oRVvMr9KK_0fGcBTlOIqWhaZigC2AuVS-4s9RncD559TJFNn-DzufhPCGkdKeXJJ8hQ/3jp/fYB54NW-TWmTEQ_5lGjcLg/h2/wglmigl8g4l-oiLRliMrkxLCkrmsIKIuZa4QJTk0D_s)
I didn’t just stand by on January 6. My military instincts kicked in that day. As someone who has been on a battlefield, I know January 6 was not legitimate political discourse. It was an attempted coup.

Even though they witnessed the same things I did, every member of the AZ GOP in Congress stood up and voted to overturn our legitimate election results even after those insurrectionists tried to take our Capitol.

**Since then, we’ve found out Paul Gosar and Andy Biggs held meetings with organizers before January 6.** The head of the AZ GOP has been subpoenaed for her role in that day’s events. And countless members of the AZ legislature are continuing to tell straight-up lies about our elections and the insurrection.

Well, since I didn’t stand idly by on January 6, I’m not going to just sit here and take it now either!

**[Team, please consider splitting a donation between my campaign and the Arizona Democratic Party, so we have the resources we need to defeat the AZ insurrectionists and the elected officials who support them this November.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wrxiVjJVo8kNicQiFnsBVpxZC06SqQUeKer8Awrmww9lI4JQZn8aEF3JIhlVntjOEK95HMEqkGPsUSGLmpY5lDTp8JzEUg696ikV3HFRQfVuAAYG5_ehDuy6csmmy0ITUY7BN7yyeG0JBQbG1AUcYpy2gGOIS4_b982-R3fN51r73hmCx2ZZoPGSFu4mpdmbpmhJj9PADWZDqzpjmKFmsccXuvOjY0JdvNgIwIKHnwDrLgDEa6duMSvQ33FekqC-e73hZM5f8schFPED0GjSomHwasL4S-F6XwdZ5opGaRaIsIxlIQuDg16CkrJUYULeGxfTC6iVlu3o7rwTtrZPTpIHois2KzyN_KZ-Yabxu2alxc16oWdEFuCL28cVaWRIIKXIdiDZSKnsO6m6cIxrsIOSfbwzkjmgnx6SxN69Gt8Q/3jp/fYB54NW-TWmTEQ_5lGjcLg/h3/iMJOM8bIxqpTE5OeYnwIo4u77696nMYuI85eVJqHkIU)**

clean_body: | | | This is about setting the record straight. | | | Team, my name is Ruben Gallego, and I represent Arizona in Congress. Before that, I was a Marine who served in Iraq. So I know the difference between “legitimate political discourse” and what an insurrection looks like. I was also on the floor of the U.S. House, listening to Paul Gosar lie to the American people when Trump insurrectionists tried to break in. So when the Republican National Committee recently voted to claim that the January 6 commission was a witch hunt for people participating in “legitimate political discourse,” I knew I couldn’t stay quiet. I’m not going to let my state or my country be taken over by insurrectionists determined to damage our democracy. So I’m personally reaching out to you to split a donation between my campaign and the Arizona Democratic Party so we can work together to defeat every single insurrectionist here in Arizona. I didn’t just stand by on January 6. My military instincts kicked in that day. As someone who has been on a battlefield, I know January 6 was not legitimate political discourse. It was an attempted coup. Even though they witnessed the same things I did, every member of the AZ GOP in Congress stood up and voted to overturn our legitimate election results even after those insurrectionists tried to take our Capitol. Since then, we’ve found out Paul Gosar and Andy Biggs held meetings with organizers before January 6. The head of the AZ GOP has been subpoenaed for her role in that day’s events. And countless members of the AZ legislature are continuing to tell straight-up lies about our elections and the insurrection. Well, since I didn’t stand idly by on January 6, I’m not going to just sit here and take it now either! If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Sincerely, Congressman Ruben Gallego For up-to-date COVID-19 information and guidance, visit Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Rick McGuire Treasurer. Arizona Democratic Party 2910 North Central Ave Phoenix AZ 85012 United States | | Sent via . We know what they're scared of: These far-right failed leaders are terrified that if everyone can access the ballot box, they'll never win another election. **We showed them that our collective voices are powerful enough to send Joe Biden to the White House and flip the Senate for Democrats – so they're trying to silence us this time around.**

body:
| This is why we need a governor like John. Hey there, By investing in green energy, we can put Ohioans to work. That’s why **John’s vision for Ohio’s comeback includes investing in clean energy.** We can create jobs **AND** tackle the climate crisis. **But team, Republicans in Columbus _refuse_ to take climate change seriously and are actively working _against_ clean energy.** In 2019 they passed an energy bill so atrocious and backwards, Vox News called it the “worst energy bill of the 21st century.” Look, we’ve had enough of the GOP’s backwards and outdated climate and jobs policies. We’ve had enough of them bailing out failing power plants. They’re holding us back _and_ making things worse, and it’s time to let them know that Ohioans want AND deserve better. **[If you think the Ohio GOP is failing us, add your name to our petition today and help us send them a message >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42000507/331229732/1470994524?amount=25&refcode=ea.8526da81-be91-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.8526da81-be91-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTI2ZGE4MS1iZTkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Hkte6gYvoBWgsN8M-0LeJwJuWuK6dpFILcmhY5S9B3Q=)** **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42000517/331229755/1470994524?amount=25&refcode=ea.8526da81-be91-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.8526da81-be91-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTI2ZGE4MS1iZTkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Hkte6gYvoBWgsN8M-0LeJwJuWuK6dpFILcmhY5S9B3Q=)** Thanks for standing with us. John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. **Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too.**

clean_body: | This is why we need a governor like John. Hey there, By investing in green energy, we can put Ohioans to work. That’s why John’s vision for Ohio’s comeback includes investing in clean energy. We can create jobs AND tackle the climate crisis. But team, Republicans in Columbus refuse to take climate change seriously and are actively working against clean energy. In 2019 they passed an energy bill so atrocious and backwards, Vox News called it the “worst energy bill of the 21st century.” Look, we’ve had enough of the GOP’s backwards and outdated climate and jobs policies. We’ve had enough of them bailing out failing power plants. They’re holding us back and making things worse, and it’s time to let them know that Ohioans want AND deserve better. = = Thanks for standing with us. Let’s help John and Teresa kickstart Ohio’s comeback and turn this ship around. Team Cranley-Fedor = = John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too. = = = = | Paid for by the Cranley Fedor for Ohio Committee CRANLEY FEDOR FOR OHIO 30 GARFIELD PLACE SUITE 900 CINCINNATI, OH 45202 United States Click here to

subject: You have a choice to make
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brandon Mosely For Congress P
body:
Look, you have two options.

| National Republicans just named California’s 41st district as a TOP battleground district. With this breaking news, we have two options:

name: Paul Schimpf
subject: Schimpf from the Trail 02/19/22
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Citizens for Schimpf · P
body:
| [](http://www.schimpf4illinois.com/?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb_19th_from_the_trail&n=1)
---
Friend, We hope this update finds you well. The issue that dominated the campaign trail this past week was parents' rights in light of the actions by JCAR and an Illinois appellate court to strike blows against JB Pritzker's student mask mandate.
Our message on parents' rights continues to resonate. Other candidates are now talking about this issue (that's a good thing), but it is our campaign has the best record and credibility on this key issue! You can watch my reaction to JB Pritzker's JCAR loss [here](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6tVgirLU9XjeyDlXT2NtRv9aKztbX_-_I_c_F8kqjFqAZmnNT4aZpr1t-JQd1JIJ_oLSyRlG-quNGdMyPkYkedA&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb_19th_from_the_trail&n=2).
You can listen to a radio interview where Carolyn discusses her background and vision for the state of Illinois [here](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=GKqXKoxzHTBdlHADEQBsXgTgLrlicPoLdAKGNKPGX6_Uuw_cqygkK46foc9gdH0G-wQykqsnwW4jtfx_QoA5Uww94LBEYaj4g_bM542IW8vvsqWzUlpB9z6f9BjMjcHgnToOdtP8j2_BX5cPCUYQzbotaEIXXNohI0RSX1VjZ5B7SgL-LLvnx8MYlvC91l4Z&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb_19th_from_the_trail&n=3).

* * *
**Volunteer of the Week** Our volunteer to highlight this week is Stan Hunter. Stan recently organized a visit for Carolyn to Union County in deep Southern Illinois, where he is the GOP County Chair. Stan has known Paul (who was his state senator) since 2016. Thank you, Stan, for your volunteer efforts and--more importantly--your friendship!
Since we both come from middle class backgrounds, writing $250K checks to our campaign to fund hired-gun political operatives is not an option for us. Instead, we rely on volunteers like you.
[If you'd like to volunteer on our campaign, click here.](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/volunteer?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb_19th_from_the_trail&n=4)
* * *
**Social Media Spotlight** Our social media post with the most traffic this week was our response to JCAR's suspension of JB Pritzker's mask mandate for Illinois students. JCAR stands for Joint Committee on Administrative Rules. Illinoisans are beginning to realize just how important JCAR is after the committee suspended JB Pritzker's student mask mandate. I am the ONLY candidate running for Illinois Governor that has experience serving on JCAR. I have the willingness and the expertise to rein in our administrative agencies and put a stop to government overreach.
[Comment, share, or like our post here!](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6tVgirLU9XjeyDlXT2NtRv9aKztbX_-_I_c_F8kqjFqARsRMd3BhbRSEbnnOgYID1CLHF2On90BeUSvSaIgDUOc&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb_19th_from_the_trail&n=5)[
](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/army_navy_game_watch_party?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb_19th_from_the_trail&n=6)
* * *
**Get Involved** We held a meet and greet this week at Johnny's Kitchen & Tap in Glenview that turned out fantastic. Thank you to the owner and our host, Mary. If you would like to host an event, please send an email to events@schimpf4illinois.org **Lastly, we are in the home stretch on petitions: even if you are only able to collect a few signatures, any amount will be a big boost to our campaign.** Again, you can [click here __ to download my petition.](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=9g-hQKRcSqWoOTpvxkNQHxn3i1LqqUTzTetgJNEvAi0oOUVR0SUwW9SvyYA55ousIR97Gn686DanKy_vJiDs3DLorBq0lUGjGH1YrsZt9hECm0dCGdzygdJKua6DT3W5&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb_19th_from_the_trail&n=7) Mail completed, notarized petition forms to Citizens for Schimpf, PO Box 16, Waterloo, IL 62298. We would like to receive petitions by February 28, 2022. Thanks for reading and Semper Fidelis, Paul

Paid for by Citizens for Schimpf · P.O. Box 16, Waterloo, IL, 62298\. A copy of our report, filed with the State Board of Elections, Springfield, IL, will be available for download or purchase from them. We do not pay for email addresses. We have your email address either because you signed up for our list at an event, you entered your email address online, or you gave your email address to us or one of our friends.
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/unsubscribe?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb_19th_from_the_trail&n=8).
You can also keep up with Paul Schimpf on [Twitter](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNEGmWwYfQ_yWb41Zx1QyVyU&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb_19th_from_the_trail&n=9) or [Facebook](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6g5cWifaQHs4q1ylFw89qVcMpLCIQGbbcgOLvTMfF-ic&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb_19th_from_the_trail&n=10).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb_19th_from_the_trail&n=11), software for leaders.

name: Kevin Kiley
subject: Two Shocking Developments
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Congress 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [The 2022 Reckoning](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQzioprUOGt3UIXMTWLHVs7BXQFiFN8Q_6U-LaOluEP-vmIEA&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb19_real_real_final&n=1) Two-thirds of swing voters say Democrats went "too far" in the COVID response. We are in for a reckoning of epic proportions. That reckoning just arrived for three school board members in San Francisco. It will next be visited upon the city’s district attorney, who faces his own Recall in June. Gavin Newsom, with his cratering poll numbers, can see the writing on the wall. As can our Legislature, apparently. The first shocking development is that [my bill](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=2mLSj4FPM2Ac4B3BVRXG3vw9qh-8nvEviiylo2zrV2aYd2tgpHQ-hUW4gVK07nHttO9nCnyVKVP01FT3tzy_UsmHtFLhZZHu5anEEyXxIJiNsR9Jfm96wK5e7tDLfkFi&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb19_real_real_final&n=2) to repeal Prop. 47 will get a vote in 2 weeks. The second is the Senate has finally agreed to debate cutting off Newsom's emergency powers. While we didn't end the emergency before the Super Bowl, we succeeded in shaming the Legislature into action. This comes as students across California walked out to protest the mask mandate. Our young people have been treated monstrously, but they’ve shown remarkable grit. That's one reason I believe we are lightning a new spark of liberty. The country is at a crossroads: follow California’s disastrous path, or restore America's Founding principles. Our battles against Newsom and the Supermajority have shown us just how much is at stake.
